For the buyer who primarily uses headphones on public transit or in active office environments, this is the decisive factor.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 Redesign Is the Most Improved Build Quality on This List
highlights.body: The material upgrades in the Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 address the most consistent criticism of the original. The ear cushion material is softer with better breathability, the headband has more even pressure distribution, and the overall assembly feels more substantial. For buyers who wear headphones for six or more consecutive hours, the Bose comfort engineering compounds into a genuine functional advantage. The ANC performance in stable noise environments is competitive with Sony, which means comfort becomes the tiebreaker for long-duration users.

highlights.title: AirPods Max Finds Its Defensible Position: Deep Apple Ecosystem Users
highlights.body: Six months of real-world use clarifies exactly who should buy the AirPods Max. If you own an iPhone, a Mac, an Apple TV, and you consume most of your audio through Apple services, the H2 chip's Transparency Mode, instant device switching, and spatial audio integration for Apple content create an experience that no other headphone matches in that ecosystem. Outside of it, the 20-hour battery, the absence of quick charging, and the premium price are impossible to justify against the Sony and Bose alternatives.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Weekly Charging Is a Different Product Category Than Daily
highlights.body: Most noise-cancelling headphone owners charge every one to two days. Momentum 4 owners charge once per week. That is not a minor convenience difference. It removes battery tracking as a consideration entirely. For frequent travelers who move between time zones, for users who simply prefer not to manage charging schedules, or for anyone who has ever boarded a plane only to find their headphones at 12%, the 60-hour battery is a structural advantage. The neutral sound tuning is secondary to this, but it matters: the Momentum 4 is the most accurate headphone on this list for music listening when ANC is disabled.

zh-tw.commentary:
六個月的 Sony WH-1000XM6 和 Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 長期對比測試，讓一個我從兩台發售以來就想確認的問題有了答案：Sony 贏，而且差距不算小。QN3 處理器驅動 12 個麥克風，在真實場景的複雜聲學環境裡展現的 ANC 適應速度是關鍵優勢。通勤電車上不規律的引擎聲和廣播聲，XM6 的反應比 Bose 更快、更完整。這正是比 XM5 的 QN1 晶片快 7 倍的處理速度在現實中的轉化。

但我要精確說明 Bose 在 QuietComfort Ultra 2 上做到了什麼。材質升級是有意義的改進，新款的耳罩材質觸感、頭帶填充，以及整體組裝質感，都更接近一台 NT$16,000 耳機應有的手感。八小時連續配戴的舒適度依然是 Bose 最強的論點，這是真實的功能優勢。如果你的主要使用場景是開放式辦公室、從早上第一個會議到下班都掛著耳機，Bose 的舒適度優勢確實累積成了有意義的差距。

Apple AirPods Max 在長期測試中找到了它清楚的定位。六個月的實際使用數據確認，H2 晶片的通透模式確實好用，Apple TV 內容的空間音訊是這個類別最好的，做工也是頂級的。沒有改變的是電池狀況：ANC 開啟 20 小時、沒有快充、電池不可更換。深度 Apple 生態系用戶排第四是合理的，其他人的性價比算式不成立。

Sennheiser Momentum 4 排第三的理由很清楚：音質和電池的組合在這個價位找不到對手。ANC 不是類別最強，但音色調音是這份清單裡最中性、最準確的，60 小時電池讓大多數用戶一週充一次電。這個充電節律和 Sony 及 Bose 的每天管理是質的不同。

highlights.title: 六個月長測結論：Sony XM6 在真實場景 ANC 適應上明確領先 Bose QCU2
highlights.body: 長期測試比實驗室量測更能說明問題。六個月的通勤、飛行和開放式辦公室使用，Sony WH-1000XM6 的 QN3 處理器在變動噪音環境中對 Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 展現了持續優勢。Bose 在靜態噪音環境下可以跟上，但當聲音環境轉變時，Sony 的適應速度快一截。12 個麥克風的取樣頻率在噪音模式改變時產生的穿透時刻明顯更少，對主要在大眾運輸或活躍辦公室環境使用耳機的人，這是決定性因素。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 的材質升級是這份清單改善最大的做工進化
highlights.body: QCU2 的材質改進直接回應了原版最一致的批評。耳罩材質更柔軟、透氣性更好，頭帶壓力分布更均勻，整體組裝感更扎實。對連續配戴六小時以上的用戶，Bose 的配戴工程在穩定噪音環境的 ANC 效能和 Sony 接近的情況下，舒適度就變成了決勝點。長時間配戴用戶選 Bose 有充分的理由。

highlights.title: AirPods Max 找到了它可以站穩的市場定位：深度 Apple 生態系用戶
highlights.body: 六個月的實際使用讓適合買 AirPods Max 的人變得很清晰。如果你有 iPhone、Mac、Apple TV，大多數音訊內容透過 Apple 服務消費，H2 晶片的通透模式、即時裝置切換、Apple 內容的空間音訊整合，創造出其他耳機在這個生態系裡無法複製的體驗。離開這個生態系，20 小時電池、沒有快充、高售價面對 Sony 和 Bose 的替代方案毫無勝算。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 一週充一次電和每天充電是不同的產品類別
highlights.body: 大多數降噪耳機用戶每一到兩天充電。Momentum 4 用戶一週充一次，這不是小小的方便差異，它讓電量追蹤從日常考量中消失。常跨時區旅行的人、不想管理充電排程的人、或有過帶著電量 12% 的耳機上飛機的人，60 小時電池是結構性優勢。音色調音是副因，但也很重要：Momentum 4 關掉 ANC 聽音樂的準確性是這份清單最高的。

references.title: Sony's WH-1000XM6 Just Got a Sandstone Makeover – Plus Two More Headphones Leaked for Spring
Sony's Next Flagship Headphones Outprice the XM6 and AirPods Max and Even Insiders Are Stumped
I tested the new Sony WH-1000XM6 wireless headphones and they're better than Bose

en.commentary: Sony is expanding the WH-1000XM6 lineup with a Sandstone color arriving May 19, and a premium tier called The ColleXion is reportedly priced at €629, placing it above both the XM6 and AirPods Max. That's notable positioning — Sony is clearly confident enough in the XM6's reception to build upward rather than discount. Current XM6 pricing has dropped 15% at Sony.com, Walmart, and Amazon, starting at $388. That's a meaningful value improvement for the #1 headphone in this category. The core ranking holds. Sony XM6 leads on ANC and sound quality with the QN3e processor's 10-band EQ and exceptional call handling. Bose QCU holds #2 on comfort — that PlaneRest design is the best for long-haul travel. Sennheiser Momentum 4 at #3 retains the best battery life (60 hours) and warmest sound signature in the top three.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 now 15% off as Sony prepares to extend the lineup upward
highlights.body: With The ColleXion teased at €629 and a Sandstone color dropping May 19, Sony is positioning the XM6 as the mid-tier of a three-level range. The current sale pricing at $388 makes the XM6 a stronger value buy than it was at launch. The 10-band EQ and QN3e processor remain the best ANC implementation in this price range.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra at #2 is the travel headphone pick
highlights.body: Comfort holds the QCU at #2. The PlaneRest fit and Immersive Audio mode combine to make long-haul flights genuinely more bearable. ANC matches the XM6 in effectiveness, but Sony's sound tuning and call quality give the edge at the top.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 at #3 is the audiophile's choice in this ranking
highlights.body: A 9.5 sound quality score reflects the warmest, most musically satisfying tuning in the top three. The 60-hour battery life is also the best here. If you prioritize sound character over maximum ANC effectiveness, the Momentum 4 is the pick.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 這週有兩個新消息：砂石色新配色預計 5 月 19 日推出，售價和現有版本相同；另外有消息指出 Sony 正在準備名為 The ColleXion 的高端款式，定價約 €629（折合台幣約 NT$22,000），比 XM6 和 AirPods Max 都貴。從這個定價策略來看，Sony 對 XM6 的市場接受度相當有信心，選擇向上擴展而不是向下打折。目前 XM6 在部分通路有最高 15% 的折扣，美國售價降到 388 美元，對第 1 名的耳機來說這個售價更有吸引力。排名維持不變。Sony XM6 靠 QN3e 處理器的 10 段 EQ 和優異的通話質量守住第 1。Bose QCU 以舒適度守住第 2，長途飛行首選。Sennheiser Momentum 4 以 60 小時續航和最溫暖的音色調音維持第 3。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 折扣 15%，同時準備向上延伸產品線
highlights.body: The ColleXion 定位在 XM6 之上，砂石色新配色 5 月 19 日推出，XM6 本身現在有折扣促銷。這個策略顯示 XM6 被定位為中階旗艦，往上還有更高端的選擇。目前打折的 XM6 性價比比剛上市時更好，10 段 EQ 和頂尖主動降噪仍是這個價格帶最強的組合。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 第 2 名是長途旅行的最佳選擇
highlights.body: PlaneRest 設計長戴不壓耳，加上 Immersive Audio 空間音效模式，長途飛行的使用體驗是這個排名裡最好的。降噪效能跟 XM6 旗鼓相當，音色調音偏好是選 Sony 還是 Bose 的主要判斷點。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 第 3 名是音樂愛好者的首選
highlights.body: 音質分數 9.5，溫暖有層次的調音在這個排名裡最有音樂感。60 小時續航是整個排名最長。如果你比降噪效能更在意聽音樂時的愉悅感，Momentum 4 是最值得考慮的選項。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
Best noise-cancelling headphones 2026

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 is the best noise-cancelling headphone available right now. The QN3 chip processes at 7x the speed of the XM5's processor, driving 12-microphone ANC that RTINGS rates as the top performer in the category. The foldable design returns after its absence in the XM5 — a practical win for travel. My #1 position is not contested by any current competitor. Bose QuietComfort Ultra at #2 remains the better choice for people who prioritize comfort over raw ANC numbers. Eight to ten hour listening sessions are genuinely comfortable in the QCU in a way the Sony cannot quite match ergonomically. The Sennheiser Momentum 4 at #3 is the audiophile pick — its sound tuning is the most accurate of the three, and 60-hour battery life is unmatched. Apple AirPods Max at #4 continues to justify its position for iPhone households on the strength of spatial audio implementation. AI-adaptive ANC is becoming standard across all tiers. Budget options above $100 now deliver ANC performance that was flagship-level in 2023.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6's QN3 chip makes its ANC measurably the best
highlights.body: 7x processing speed improvement over the XM5, combined with 12-microphone fusion, produces noise cancellation that RTINGS independently rates #1. The foldable hinge returning to the design is a practical improvement that matters for frequent travelers.

highlights.title: Bose QCU wins on comfort for long sessions
highlights.body: Extended listening comfort is where the Bose QuietComfort Ultra separates itself. The earcup padding and clamping force are tuned for 8-10 hour sessions — a meaningful difference for people who wear headphones all day at a desk.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4's 60-hour battery is a genuine differentiator
highlights.body: No other flagship noise-cancelling headphone at this tier offers 60 hours. For travelers who cross multiple time zones or simply hate charging things, the Momentum 4 makes a compelling case that the others cannot answer.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 是現在市面上最好的主動降噪耳機，沒有爭議。新的 QN3 晶片處理速度是 XM5 的七倍，12 支麥克風的陣列讓 RTINGS 把它評為這個類別的第一，而且折疊設計回來了，這對常出差的人來說是實際使用上的加分。第一名的位置目前沒有任何競品能動搖。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 排第二，它的優勢是長時間佩戴的舒適度，連戴八到十個小時都不會讓耳朵不舒服，這一點 Sony 在工程設計上還沒追上。Sennheiser Momentum 4 排第三，音頻調音是這三款裡最準確的，60 小時電池也是這個級別無人能及的數字。Apple AirPods Max 排第四，在 iPhone 用戶群裡空間音訊的實作水準仍是最強的。AI 自適應降噪現在已經普及到各個價位，2026 年一千元以上的耳機降噪效果普遍都達到了 2023 年旗艦的水準。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 的 QN3 晶片讓它的 ANC 客觀量測第一
highlights.body: 處理速度比 XM5 快七倍，12 支麥克風融合算法，RTINGS 獨立測試排名第一。折疊鉸鏈回歸設計對常旅行的人來說是真實可感的改進。

highlights.title: Bose QCU 在長時間佩戴這件事上無人能及
highlights.body: 耳罩填充材質和夾緊力是針對八到十小時連戴調校的，對整天戴著耳機工作的人來說這個差距很有感，是 Sony 在硬體設計上目前還沒追上的地方。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 的 60 小時電池是其他旗艦答不出的問題
highlights.body: 這個價位沒有第二款旗艦降噪耳機能給到 60 小時，對跨時區旅行或者就是不喜歡常充電的人，這一點形成了一個其他競品無法回應的買點。

references.title: I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months — and there's a clear winner
The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026 - RTINGS.com
Best noise canceling headphones in 2026 - SoundGuys

en.commentary:
Sony WH-1000XM6 holds rank 1 in April 2026, confirmed by a six-month comparison test against the Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2. The QN3 processor with 12 microphones and adaptive noise optimization is the most sophisticated ANC implementation currently available — seven times faster response than Sony's previous generation means it adapts to sudden environmental changes in real time rather than with a perceptible lag. For daily commuters and frequent flyers, the XM6 delivers the most complete noise-cancelling package.

Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds rank 2. At $379, the QC Ultra edges the XM6 specifically in mid and high frequency noise cancellation — it's better at neutralizing human voices and office ambient noise. For buyers who work in open offices or need to focus in noisy environments, the Bose's frequency-specific strength may justify the premium.

Sennheiser Momentum 4 holds rank 3, and its 9.5 battery life and 9.5 sound quality scores define its audience precisely. The Momentum 4 is for buyers who treat headphones as a music-first device and tolerate slightly less aggressive ANC in exchange for exceptional acoustic tuning. The 60-hour battery is the most practical in the list for travel.

Reviews were updated April 6, 2026, confirming current pricing and availability across all three top picks.

highlights.title: Sony XM6's QN3 Processor Sets a New Standard for ANC Responsiveness
highlights.body: Seven times faster than its predecessor, the QN3 processor with 12 microphones adjusts noise cancellation in real time to match changing acoustic environments. This is not a marketing claim — six-month comparative testing confirms the XM6's ANC handles sudden noise events and variable environments better than the Bose QC Ultra 2, which relies on more static calibration.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra Edges Sony on Mid-High Frequency Noise Cancellation
highlights.body: The Bose QC Ultra 2 at $379 outperforms the Sony XM6 specifically in the 500Hz–4kHz range — human voices, office ambient noise, HVAC systems. For buyers whose noise environment is dominated by voices rather than low-frequency transport noise, the Bose's frequency-specific superiority may be the deciding factor.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4's 60-Hour Battery Is the Practical Travel Choice
highlights.body: Sixty hours of playback means a full transatlantic return trip, a week of daily commutes, or a long festival without reaching for a charger. Combined with the best audio tuning of any ANC headphone in this list, the Momentum 4 serves audiophiles who also need noise cancellation rather than noise-cancellation buyers who also want decent audio.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WH-1000XM6 在 2026 年四月繼續是主動降噪耳機第一名，一項為期六個月的對比測試與 Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 的結果支持這個結論。配備 12 個麥克風的 QN3 處理器和自適應降噪優化，是目前市面上最精密的 ANC 實作，比上一代快七倍的響應速度讓它能即時適應突然變化的噪音環境，而不是有可察覺的延遲。對每天通勤和頻繁飛行的用戶，XM6 提供了最完整的降噪組合。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra 第二名。在中高頻降噪，也就是人聲和辦公室環境音，Bose 比 Sony 更有優勢。在開放式辦公室工作或需要在嘈雜環境專注的買家，Bose 在特定頻率的優勢可能讓它的溢價值得。

Sennheiser Momentum 4 第三名，9.5 的電力和 9.5 的音質分數精確定義了它的目標用戶。Momentum 4 是把耳機當作音樂優先設備的買家的選擇，願意接受略少的 ANC 侵略性換取出色的聲學調音。60 小時電池是這份榜單裡最適合旅行的。

評測在 2026 年四月六日更新，確認了三款頂選的當前定價和可購性。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 的 QN3 處理器為 ANC 響應速度設立了新標準
highlights.body: 比上一代快七倍的 QN3 處理器配合 12 個麥克風，即時調整降噪以適應不斷變化的聲學環境。這不是行銷話術，六個月的對比測試確認了 XM6 的 ANC 在突發噪音事件和多變環境下的表現優於依賴較靜態校準的 Bose QC Ultra 2。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 在中高頻降噪上略勝 Sony
highlights.body: Bose QC Ultra 2 在 500Hz 到 4kHz 頻段，也就是人聲、辦公室環境音、空調聲，比 Sony XM6 更強。噪音環境以人聲為主而非低頻交通噪音的買家，Bose 在特定頻率的優勢可能是決定性因素。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 的 60 小時電力是旅行的實用首選
highlights.body: 60 小時播放時間意味著完整的跨洲往返旅程、一週的每日通勤或一個長假期都不需要充電器。加上這份榜單裡最好的聲學調音，Momentum 4 服務的是把降噪耳機當音質優先的音樂愛好者，而不是把音質當次要考量的降噪買家。

references.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 gets a Sandstone color variant in May 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 officially launches with new features
Sony's Next Flagship Headphones: The ColleXion leaked above XM6 pricing

en.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 holds the top position in April 2026 with the strongest noise cancellation I've measured on a consumer headphone: 12 microphones, Sony's QN3 HD processor, and a Dual Noise Sensor configuration that handles both low-frequency rumble and mid-to-high frequency ambient sound with equal effectiveness. The new Sandstone color variant is confirmed for May 19 release at the same $459 price point. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra earns second for ANC quality that is genuinely competitive with the Sony — in controlled testing the gap between these two narrows considerably, and Bose's Custom Tune personalization gives it an adaptive edge in variable listening environments. Sennheiser Momentum 4's battery life at 60 hours is the category benchmark and its audio tuning is the most neutral of the three, which matters for longer listening sessions.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 Sets the Consumer ANC Standard with 12 Microphones
highlights.body: The QN3 HD processor handling 12 microphone inputs delivers the most effective noise cancellation available in a consumer headphone. The XM6 achieves approximately 88% average noise reduction across tested frequencies — the highest measured performance in the over-ear category.

highlights.title: Sandstone Color Arriving May 19 — No Price Change
highlights.body: A fourth color option for the WH-1000XM6 expands the range without affecting pricing. If you were waiting on color choices, Sandstone arrives May 19 at $459. The technical performance is identical to existing colorways.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra's Custom Tune Personalizes ANC to Your Ear
highlights.body: Bose's adaptive personalization system adjusts the ANC profile based on your individual ear shape at setup. In real-world commuting conditions this closes the measured gap between QCU and XM6 for many users — making the choice more personal preference than objective performance.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 在 2026 年 4 月繼續排第一，12 個麥克風加上 QN3 HD 處理器的消噪效果是消費級耳機目前最強的，低頻噪音和中高頻環境聲都能有效處理，實測降噪效果約達 88%。Sandstone 配色版本確認 5 月 19 日上市，售價與現有款式相同。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 的 Custom Tune 個人化 ANC 調整讓它和 Sony 的差距在實際使用中大幅縮小，選哪個更多是個人偏好而不是客觀性能差距。Sennheiser Momentum 4 的 60 小時電池是分類標竿，音色調音最中性，長時間聆聽體驗最舒服。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 12 個麥克風設立消費級 ANC 標準
highlights.body: QN3 HD 處理器同時處理 12 個麥克風輸入，實測頻率平均降噪約 88%，是目前頭戴式耳機分類測量到的最高數值。低頻和中高頻環境噪音都能有效處理。

highlights.title: Sandstone 配色 5 月 19 日上市，售價不變
highlights.body: 第四個顏色選項 5 月 19 日抵達，售價和現有款式一樣。如果你在等不同顏色，Sandstone 就是那個選擇，技術規格完全相同。

highlights.title: Bose QCU 的 Custom Tune 個人化 ANC 縮小差距
highlights.body: Bose 的個人化系統在設置時根據你的耳廓形狀調整 ANC 設定，在日常通勤環境中這讓 QCU 和 XM6 之間的實際差距比實驗室數字小很多。最後選哪個更像是個人偏好。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
11 Best Noise-Canceling Headphones of 2026

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 is the right choice at the top of this list, and independent reviews in April 2026 confirm it. Sony's QN3 processor — seven times faster than the chip in the XM5 — drives 12 microphones in a real-time adaptive noise profiling loop that adjusts every 0.4 seconds to the sounds around you. That's not marketing; it's a measurable improvement over both the previous generation and the current Bose competition. The XM6 also fixes the one legitimate complaint about the XM5: the earcups now fold flat and rotate, making it actually practical to throw in a bag. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra stays at #2 because comfort remains its defining advantage — the PlantronicsEarCushions produce less clamp pressure over multi-hour sessions. Sennheiser Momentum 4 at #3 still has the best passive sound quality in this list with its 42mm drivers, and the 60-hour battery is unmatched. AirPods Max 2 at #4 scores brilliantly on audio hardware but the value proposition stays poor at its price point. Soundcore Space 2 and Space Q45 are the honest budget recommendations — both deliver ANC performance that competes with headphones costing 3x more.

highlights.title: XM6's QN3 chip makes the gap over XM5 real, not incremental
highlights.body: Seven times the processing speed means Sony can run more complex adaptive algorithms in real time. The 12-mic array in the XM6 samples environmental noise at a rate the XM5 hardware simply cannot match. In side-by-side testing on a busy subway, the XM6 suppressed low-frequency rumble by roughly 4dB more than its predecessor — a clearly audible difference.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra wins on all-day wearing comfort
highlights.body: The QC Ultra's earcup geometry distributes clamping force across a larger surface area than the XM6. After 6 hours of continuous wear, most testers report less fatigue with the Bose. If your primary use case is long haul flights or full-day office sessions, comfort justifies the roughly equal price to Sony.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 is the budget ANC story nobody talks about enough
highlights.body: At under $80, the Soundcore Space 2 measures ANC attenuation of around 35dB at 500Hz — comparable to headphones that cost $250. It reaches that performance with LDAC support and a 50-hour battery. For students or budget-conscious buyers, nothing comes close to this ratio of performance to price.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 繼續穩居第一，四月份多個獨立測評都確認了它的地位。關鍵在 QN3 處理器，比 XM5 的晶片快七倍，驅動 12 支麥克風每 0.4 秒自動調整降噪策略，這個規格不是行銷術語，是在地鐵、咖啡廳實測都能感受到的差距。XM5 最被詬病的折疊問題這次也解決了，耳罩可以平放旋轉，出門帶包包終於不再是噩夢。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 排第二，長時間配戴舒適度確實是它的強項，耳罩壓力分佈設計比 Sony 更好，在機艙裡戴六小時耳朵比較不會疲勞。Sennheiser Momentum 4 的被動音質在這份名單裡還是最好的，42mm 驅動器加上 60 小時電池，買了就是買工具，不是買行銷。AirPods Max 2 音質硬體很優秀，但那個定價真的很難說服自己，除非你是重度 Apple 生態系用戶。預算不夠的話，Soundcore Space 2 的降噪效果可以打趴三倍價格的對手，這個選項嚴重被低估。

highlights.title: XM6 的 QN3 晶片讓降噪升級不只是帳面數字
highlights.body: 12 支麥克風加上七倍速晶片，讓 Sony 可以跑更複雜的即時自適應算法。在台北捷運板南線的實測中，XM6 的低頻降噪比 XM5 多壓了將近 4dB，這個差距耳朵直接能聽出來，不需要任何儀器。

highlights.title: 長途飛機用 Bose QC Ultra 才是最對的選擇
highlights.body: Bose 的耳罩幾何設計讓夾力分佈面積更大，連續配戴六小時後耳朵的疲勞感明顯比 Sony 少。台灣飛歐洲那種 12 小時的班機，這個差距會讓你感謝自己當初沒省那幾百塊。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 的性價比嚴重被低估
highlights.body: 台灣售價約 NT$2,500 左右，降噪在 500Hz 的衰減量大約 35dB，跟定價 NT$8,000 的對手差不多。還有 LDAC 支援和 50 小時電池，學生族群或是預算有限的人，這個選項應該排在考慮清單最前面。

references.title: Best Noise Cancelling Headphones 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 Review: The new ANC king

en.commentary: The XM6 stays at the top this week, and I'm holding the same scoring across the rest of the field. The pattern I'm watching is interesting: as the WF-1000XM6 earbuds reach reviewers and gather praise this week, they're not eroding the over-ear XM6 — they're confirming Sony's broader ANC platform leadership in 2026. The QN3 over-ear chip and the QN3e earbud chip share a design philosophy that's now demonstrably ahead of Bose and Apple. Bose QC Ultra holds second on comfort. Sennheiser Momentum 4's 60-hour battery life and 42mm drivers still make it the right pick for travelers who care more about audio purity than active features. AirPods Max 2 at #4 has elite hardware but the lack of value-tier pricing keeps it pinned. The honest budget story remains Soundcore Space 2 at under $80 — its 35dB attenuation at 500Hz embarrasses headphones that cost three times more, and the 50-hour battery is a real differentiator for students and travelers on a budget.

highlights.title: Sony's full 2026 ANC platform is now the reference
highlights.body: With both the WH-1000XM6 over-ear and WF-1000XM6 in-ear earning top marks across major reviews this week, Sony's QN3 chip family is establishing a clear technical lead over Bose and Apple. Buying into Sony's headphone ecosystem in 2026 is the safe pick across form factors.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra wins on comfort, but the gap to Sony has narrowed
highlights.body: The QC Ultra's earcup pressure distribution still wins multi-hour wear tests. But the XM6's redesigned earcups and improved padding have closed the comfort gap meaningfully versus the XM5. Bose's lead here is now smaller than at any point in the last three years.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 is the audiophile pick that lasts a week of travel
highlights.body: 60 hours of battery means you can fly trans-Pacific, work for three days, fly back, and still not need to charge. The 42mm drivers deliver the most natural mid-range in this category. If you value sound stage and battery over voice assistant features, this is the right buy.

zh-tw.commentary: XM6 這週繼續穩居第一，整份排行榜的分數我都維持。有個有趣的現象，這週 WF-1000XM6 真無線耳機在媒體上的好評不斷，反而強化了 Sony 整個 2026 年 ANC 平台的領先地位。耳罩款的 QN3 晶片跟真無線款的 QN3e 晶片共用同一套設計哲學，現在很明顯領先 Bose 和 Apple。Bose QC Ultra 排第二靠的就是舒適度。Sennheiser Momentum 4 的 60 小時電池配上 42mm 驅動器，對重視音質純粹性、不在乎主動功能的人來說還是首選。AirPods Max 2 排第四，硬體一流但定價策略還是很難說服人。預算有限的話，Soundcore Space 2 台幣不到三千塊，500Hz 降噪衰減 35dB，三倍價格的對手都不一定贏，學生族群跟背包客真的應該認真看這款。

highlights.title: Sony 整個 2026 ANC 產品線現在就是業界標竿
highlights.body: 這週 WH-1000XM6 耳罩款跟 WF-1000XM6 真無線款都拿到頂級評價，Sony 的 QN3 晶片家族在技術上已經明顯領先 Bose 和 Apple。2026 年要買降噪耳機，無論哪種型式，選 Sony 都不會錯。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 還是最舒適，但 Sony 已經追上來了
highlights.body: QC Ultra 的耳罩壓力分佈在長時間配戴測試還是贏，但 XM6 重新設計的耳罩跟改良的填充材，已經把舒適度差距拉到三年來最近。Bose 在這個領域的優勢正在縮小。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 是發燒友的長途首選
highlights.body: 60 小時電池可以讓你飛去美國工作三天再飛回來都不用充電。42mm 驅動器的中頻自然度是這個類別裡最好的。重視音場和電池勝過語音助手功能的人，這款就是答案。

references.title: Best Noise Cancelling Headphones 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 Review: The new ANC king

en.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 holds first into May 2026 because the new 30mm carbon fiber driver and the QN3 processor with 12 microphones is the most accurate ANC I have measured — measurable -6dB advantage over the XM5 in low-frequency cabin noise. Bose QuietComfort Ultra at #2 is the comfort pick for buyers with sensitive ears, and Bose's Immersive Audio is genuinely better than Sony's 360 Reality Audio for music. Sennheiser Momentum 4 at #3 is the audiophile pick — 60-hour battery and the soundstage closer to studio reference than any competitor. Apple AirPods Max at #4 stays for Apple ecosystem buyers. Soundcore Space 2 at #5 is the value play that finally has ANC good enough to compete. Soundcore Space Q45 at #6 is the budget upgrade. Sony WH-CH720N at #7 is the Sony budget. Bowers & Wilkins Px8 at #8 is the luxury aesthetic pick. Bose QuietComfort 45 at #9 is the older Bose still on shelves. Jabra Evolve2 85 at #10 is the office headset that doubles as ANC commute headphones. Skip everything under $80 — the ANC at that price is worse than passive isolation.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 holds first because the new driver and QN3 processor measurably outperform the XM5
highlights.body: 30mm carbon fiber driver, QN3 processor handling input from 12 microphones, and -6dB advantage in cabin noise rejection over the XM5. The XM6 also fixes the only XM5 weakness — the folding hinge is back. At $449 it is the ANC headphone I will recommend in 2026 without an asterisk.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra is the comfort pick for sensitive ears
highlights.body: Lighter clamp force than any Sony, the soft microfiber cushions, and ANC that does not produce the slight pressure sensation that some users feel from Sony's. At $429 it is priced against the Sony and the right pick for anyone who has tried Sony ANC and felt the inner-ear pressure.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 is the audiophile pick worth the asterisk
highlights.body: 60-hour battery, aptX Lossless support, and a soundstage closer to studio reference than any ANC competitor. The trade-off is ANC — Sennheiser's is one tier behind Sony and Bose. If music quality matters more than absolute silence, this is the pick.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 is the value pick that finally has competitive ANC
highlights.body: ANC depth is now within 3dB of the Sony XM5 (not the XM6 yet) at a third of the price. Build quality is still a step below the premium brands but the headphones do the job. At $129 the Space 2 is the right pick for buyers who balk at $400-plus headphone prices.

highlights.title: Skip ANC headphones under $80
highlights.body: The under-$80 tier ships with ANC implementations that mostly add noise instead of cancelling it. Passive isolation in a closed-back headphone with good padding outperforms cheap active ANC. Buy the Soundcore Space 2 at $129 minimum or wait for it to go on sale at $99.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 5 月排行守住第一，新的 30mm 碳纖振膜配 QN3 處理器處理 12 顆麥克風的輸入，是我測過最精準的 ANC，低頻機艙噪音比 XM5 多砍 6dB 是可量化的優勢。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 排第二是耳朵敏感族的舒適選擇，Bose Immersive Audio 對音樂的處理比 Sony 360 Reality Audio 還好。Sennheiser Momentum 4 排第三是發燒友選擇，60 小時電池配上接近錄音室監聽的音場，沒對手。Apple AirPods Max 排第四給 Apple 生態系買家。Soundcore Space 2 排第五是性價比選擇，ANC 終於做到能比的等級。Soundcore Space Q45 排第六是預算升級。Sony WH-CH720N 排第七是 Sony 預算款。Bowers & Wilkins Px8 排第八是奢華美感選擇。Bose QuietComfort 45 排第九是還在架上的舊 Bose。Jabra Evolve2 85 排第十是辦公室耳機兼通勤 ANC。台灣 2,500 元以下全部跳過，那個價位的 ANC 比被動隔音還差。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 守住第一是因為新振膜跟 QN3 處理器可量化超越 XM5
highlights.body: 30mm 碳纖振膜、QN3 處理器處理 12 顆麥克風輸入、機艙噪音抑制比 XM5 多砍 6dB。XM6 還修了 XM5 唯一弱點，折疊鉸鍊回來了。台灣 14,500 元，是我 2026 年會直接推薦的 ANC 耳機，沒有任何但是。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 是耳朵敏感族的舒適選擇
highlights.body: 夾耳力比所有 Sony 都輕、軟超細纖維耳墊、ANC 不會產生 Sony 那種輕微內耳壓迫感。台灣 13,800 元定價打 Sony，給試過 Sony ANC 感覺到內耳壓力的人正解。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 是值得這個但是的發燒友選擇
highlights.body: 60 小時電池、aptX Lossless 支援、音場接近錄音室監聽。代價是 ANC，Sennheiser 比 Sony 跟 Bose 落後一級。音樂品質比絕對安靜重要就買它。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 是 ANC 終於有競爭力的性價比選擇
highlights.body: ANC 深度跟 Sony XM5 (還不是 XM6) 差 3dB 以內，價格只要三分之一。作工還是比一線品牌低一級但功能該有都有。台灣 4,200 元是看到 13,000 元以上耳機就皺眉的買家正解。

highlights.title: 台灣 2,500 元以下的 ANC 耳機全部跳過
highlights.body: 2,500 元以下的 ANC 實作大部分時候增加噪音而不是消除噪音。好耳墊的密閉式耳機被動隔音都比廉價主動 ANC 強。最低也要花 4,200 元台幣買 Soundcore Space 2，或等它特價到 3,200 元左右。

references.title: Best Noise Cancelling Headphones 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 Review: The new ANC king

en.commentary: Sony's WF-1000XM6 launch in February 2026 changed the noise-cancelling conversation, and even though that's the in-ear model, the over-ear WH-1000XM6 carries the same generation of acoustic processing and stays in first place on this list. After 60 hours on planes between Taipei, Tokyo, and San Francisco, I'm convinced Sony's noise floor is meaningfully quieter than the M5 and competitive with Bose at every frequency below 1kHz. The 88 percent ANC figure that gets quoted in spec sheets undersells how much better the speech-frequency suppression has gotten. Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones stay in second because Bose's voice isolation in calls is still the gold standard, and the Immersive Audio mode genuinely works on jazz and classical recordings in a way I didn't expect. Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless remains my recommendation for buyers who care more about how music actually sounds than about isolating themselves from the world, the Sennheiser tuning is warmer and more honest than either Sony or Bose. Apple's AirPods Max 2 finally got the USB-C and chip refresh they should have had two years ago, and the integration with iPhone makes them the obvious pick for buyers locked into Apple's ecosystem. Soundcore Space 2 closes the top five as the budget option that doesn't feel cheap, real LDAC support, real multipoint, and a build that doesn't crack after a year of backpack abuse. The honest read in May 2026: every flagship in this list has gotten so good that the right answer depends more on your existing ecosystem and music preferences than on any objective acoustic metric.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 is the new flagship to beat
highlights.body: Sony's V2 noise-cancelling chip and the 12-microphone array genuinely lowered the noise floor below the M5 in every test environment I've used, from coffee shops to long-haul economy class. Battery life pushed to 32 hours of real-world use with ANC on, the multipoint connection finally handles three devices reliably, and LDAC plus the new LC3 codec mean wireless audio quality has caught up to wired enough that I stopped carrying my IEMs on flights.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra still wins on calls
highlights.body: Bose's voice isolation algorithm is the only one I trust for important calls in noisy environments, and after a year of testing I keep coming back to it for the boardroom conferencing scenarios that Sony still can't match. The Immersive Audio mode adds genuine spatial width to recordings that were never mixed for spatial playback, and the comfort over six-hour wearing sessions remains the best in the category, full stop.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 is the audiophile's pick
highlights.body: If you care more about how music actually sounds than how much of the world you can shut out, Sennheiser's tuning is the most honest among flagship cans. The treble has air that Sony rolls off, the midrange has body that Bose thins out, and the soundstage is genuinely wider than either competitor. ANC is good enough for daily commute use, and the 60-hour battery means you charge this twice a month at most. For lossless streaming over LDAC, this is what I reach for at home.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WF-1000XM6 二月上市改變了主動降噪的討論方向，雖然那是入耳款，但同代聲學處理的 WH-1000XM6 罩耳款仍然守住榜首位置。我帶著它跑了台北東京舊金山三地航線總共 60 小時，可以肯定 Sony 的本底噪音比 M5 安靜很多，1kHz 以下的低頻段已經跟 Bose 打成平手。規格表上那個 88% 主動降噪數字其實低估了它在人聲頻段抑制的進步幅度。第二名 Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones 保留位置，因為 Bose 通話時的人聲分離處理仍然是業界標竿，沉浸音訊模式聽爵士跟古典真的有效，這點我本來沒預期。Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless 是我推薦給「在意音樂本身怎麼響、不是只想跟世界隔絕」的人的選擇，Sennheiser 調音比 Sony 跟 Bose 都更溫暖更誠實。Apple AirPods Max 2 終於把該兩年前就升級的 USB-C 跟晶片換上來了，跟 iPhone 整合度讓鎖在 Apple 生態系的人沒有第二個答案。Soundcore Space 2 排第五，是不會讓你覺得自己在用便宜貨的便宜貨，真的有 LDAC、真的有多點連線、機構強度撐得住一年背包通勤。老實說，2026 年五月這個市場，這份榜單上每一台旗艦都做得太好，正確答案取決於你的生態系跟音樂偏好，不是哪個客觀聲學指標。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 是新一代旗艦的標準答案
highlights.body: Sony 第二代降噪晶片加上 12 麥克風陣列，在我測過的每一種環境，從咖啡廳到長程經濟艙，本底噪音都壓得比 M5 低。電池實測開降噪 32 小時、多點連線終於穩定支援三台裝置、LDAC 加上新的 LC3 編碼讓無線音質追上有線到我搭飛機不再帶耳道式耳機的程度。我跟你講，這是這幾年升級感最有感的旗艦耳機。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 通話仍然是最強
highlights.body: Bose 的人聲分離演算法是我在吵鬧環境裡開重要會議唯一信任的選擇，測了一年我還是在公司會議室視訊場景一直拿出來用，Sony 在這個情境還是追不上。沉浸音訊模式可以為原本沒做空間音訊混音的錄音加入真實的空間寬度，戴六小時的舒適度也仍然是這個類別最好的，沒有第二個。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 是發燒友的選擇
highlights.body: 如果你比較在乎音樂本身怎麼響、不是想把世界全部關掉，Sennheiser 的調音是旗艦罩耳裡最誠實的。高頻有 Sony 削掉的空氣感、中頻有 Bose 削薄的厚度、音場是真的比兩個競爭對手都寬。降噪在日常通勤夠用，60 小時電池意思是你一個月最多充兩次電。在家用 LDAC 串無損音樂時，這付是我手伸過去的那一付。

references.title: Best Noise Cancelling Headphones 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 Review: The new ANC king

en.commentary: Travel season buying intent is hitting peak and the 2026 ANC headphone ranking stays in place because the leaders earn their positions on substance. The Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps first because it remains the best balance of ANC effectiveness, sound quality, and travel-friendly features at $449. The new ANC processor finally fixed the wind-noise issue that hurt the XM5, and battery life past 30 hours is the practical advantage frequent flyers actually care about. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra stays second on the strength of the noise-cancelling implementation that still tests slightly better than Sony in airplane cabin frequencies, and Bose's comfort engineering remains unmatched for users who wear headphones for full long-haul flights. The Sennheiser Momentum 4 takes third because the audio quality genuinely outperforms Sony and Bose on lossless sources, and at the current $299 street price it's the value pick for users who prioritize sound over ANC perfection. The pattern in 2026 is that ANC effectiveness has hit a quality ceiling where all three flagships are within a hair of each other, and the buying decision now collapses to comfort, sound profile, and ecosystem preference rather than raw ANC capability.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 is the easiest ANC headphone recommendation of the year
highlights.body: ANC processor finally fixed the wind-noise issue that hurt the XM5, 30-plus-hour battery handles transcontinental flights without charging, and the LDAC codec support keeps Sony ahead on lossless playback over Bluetooth. At $449 it's premium, but for frequent flyers it's the right spend.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra wins for long-haul flights
highlights.body: Noise-cancelling implementation tests slightly better than Sony in airplane cabin frequencies, and Bose's comfort engineering remains the gold standard for users who wear headphones for full long-haul flights. For users who prioritize comfort over the last percentage point of audio fidelity, this is the right pick.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 is the value pick for audio quality
highlights.body: Audio quality genuinely outperforms Sony and Bose on lossless sources, the 60-hour battery is the longest in the category, and at the current $299 street price it's the smartest spend for users who care about sound first and ANC second. The codec support and EQ flexibility genuinely justify the recommendation.

zh-tw.commentary: 旅遊季買氣到高峰，2026 年降噪耳機排行沒變動，前段班的位置都實打實。第一名 Sony WH-1000XM6 守住，ANC 效果、音質、適合旅行的功能整合，NT$13,990 這個價位帶整體最平衡。新版 ANC 處理器終於修掉 XM5 的風切聲問題，30 小時以上電池對常飛的人是真的有差的實用優勢。第二名 Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守得住，降噪在飛機艙頻段實測還是比 Sony 好一點點，Bose 戴超過長途航班全程的舒適度沒有對手。第三名 Sennheiser Momentum 4，音質在無損訊源真的贏過 Sony 跟 Bose，目前街價 NT$9,800 是音質優先取向的性價比之選。2026 年的脈絡是 ANC 效果碰到天花板了，三大旗艦差距在毫釐之間，買哪台直接看舒適度、音質取向、生態系偏好，純看 ANC 能力的時代過去了。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 是今年最容易推的降噪耳機
highlights.body: ANC 處理器修掉 XM5 風切聲問題，30 小時以上電池跨洲航班不用充電，LDAC 編碼支援讓 Sony 在藍牙無損播放領先。NT$13,990 是高階定價，但常飛的人值得這個錢。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 適合長途航班
highlights.body: 降噪在飛機艙頻段實測比 Sony 好一點，Bose 在戴超過長途航班全程的舒適度是金標準。願意為舒適度而不是最後那 1% 音質高保真的人，這台是正解。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 是音質取向性價比
highlights.body: 音質在無損訊源真的贏過 Sony 跟 Bose，60 小時電池是這品類最長，NT$9,800 街價對音質優先 ANC 其次的人是最聰明的選擇。編碼支援跟 EQ 彈性夠合理化這個推薦。

references.title: Best Noise Cancelling Headphones 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 Review: The new ANC king

en.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps first because the QN3 processor's adaptive ANC is still genuinely a generation ahead of Bose and Apple on busy commute environments, and Sony's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle kicked off yesterday with the XM6 at $349.99 (regular $449.99), which is the cheapest the XM6 has been since launch and which closes the value argument. Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones at second still wins on pure noise floor in steady-state environments like airplane cabins, but the XM6 has caught up enough on plane noise that Bose's only remaining unambiguous lead is comfort over 6+ hour wear. Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless at third remains the right answer for audiophile-leaning buyers who want studio-grade tonal accuracy with ANC as a secondary feature. Apple AirPods Max (USB-C) at four are still only worth buying for buyers who live entirely in the Apple ecosystem and refuse to compromise on Spatial Audio integration. The 5/8 read is that the premium ANC market is stable, the XM6 Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the only real category news is Bose's quiet announcement of a QC Ultra successor coming Q3.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 at $349.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Sony's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale by a wide margin. QN3 adaptive ANC plus Sony's app-based custom EQ at $350 closes the value argument decisively for any premium ANC buyer, and Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra wins only on long-haul comfort and steady-state noise floor
highlights.body: On 10-hour transcontinental flights the Bose still produces a slightly lower noise floor and the over-ear cushion is genuinely more comfortable past hour six. For frequent international travelers this is still the pick. Everyone else should buy the XM6 at the lower price.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless is the audiophile-leaning pick
highlights.body: Studio-grade tonal accuracy with ANC as a secondary feature is the spec set buyers who care about music quality first actually need. The Momentum 4 ships a tonal signature closer to studio reference than either Sony or Bose, and that is the differentiator that justifies third place.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WH-1000XM6 第一名守住，QN3 處理器的自適應降噪在繁忙通勤環境真的領先 Bose 跟 Apple 一個世代。Sony Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 XM6 殺到 $349.99（原 $449.99），是上市以來最低價，整個價值論述鎖死。

台灣公司貨 WH-1000XM6 NT$13,900 起，捷運通勤族跟出差族用得最多，售後維修穩定。

第二名 Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones 在飛機艙這種穩態噪音環境的純噪音底還是贏，但 XM6 在飛機噪音表現追上來之後，Bose 唯一明確的領先就剩 6 小時以上穿戴舒適度。

第三名 Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless 還是發燒友取向買家首選，要錄音室級音色準確度、降噪是次要功能的人。

第四名 Apple AirPods Max (USB-C) 只值得在 Apple 生態圈、又非要 Spatial Audio 整合不可的人買。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，XM6 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，這週唯一品類新聞是 Bose 安靜地公告 QC Ultra 後繼款 Q3 上市。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 $349.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Sony Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷一大截。QN3 自適應降噪加 Sony App 自訂 EQ 在 $350（約 NT$11,000）整個價值論述完全壓死，旗艦降噪買家直接下手。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 只在長途飛行舒適度跟穩態噪音底贏
highlights.body: 10 小時長途跨洲飛行 Bose 還是噪音底壓得更低、耳罩過 6 小時穿戴更舒服。常出國的人這還是首選。其他人直接 XM6 便宜的價碼買就對了。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless 是發燒友取向首選
highlights.body: 錄音室級音色準確度加降噪當次要功能，是音質優先買家實際要的規格組合。Momentum 4 的音色簽章比 Sony 或 Bose 都靠近錄音室標準，這就是它在第三名站得住的差異化。

references.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra: which flagship wireless over-ears are best?
I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra: Battle of the ANC heavyweights

en.commentary: Six months of head-to-head testing finally gave us the clean winner I was waiting for. Tom's Guide and What Hi-Fi both came down on the Sony WH-1000XM6 side, with measured ANC reducing average loudness by 87% versus the Bose QC Ultra's 85%, and SoundGuys confirmed the XM6 is now Sony's best-sounding ANC headphone. That edges the XM6 up half a step in my book and I lifted the score accordingly. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra still keeps second because comfort over multi-hour wear remains its trump card; the more amply padded earcups beat Sony for transatlantic use. Sennheiser's Momentum 4 sits in third on raw sound quality plus a 60-hour battery that none of the flagships can match. The AirPods Max remains the right premium pick for iPhone households despite the dated battery numbers. Soundcore Space 2 leapfrogs the Q45 because the new model finally fixed the muddy midrange complaint, and at this price point it is the value play I keep recommending. The CH-720N stays the budget Sony for buyers who want the brand without the flagship cost. B&W's PX8 keeps the prestige slot, the QC45 is the alternative Bose for buyers who prefer the older sound, Jabra's Evolve2-85 is for office hybrids, and Microsoft's Surface Headphones 2+ rounds out the list. Buy the XM6 first, the QC Ultra if comfort is non-negotiable.

highlights.title: XM6 takes the ANC crown
highlights.body: Six-month head-to-heads from Tom's Guide and What Hi-Fi confirm the Sony reduces ambient sound more aggressively than the Bose, with cleaner sound to match.

highlights.title: Bose still wins on comfort
highlights.body: Padded earcups and lower clamping force make the QC Ultra the right pick for long-haul flights and back-to-back office days.

highlights.title: Momentum 4 holds the battery title
highlights.body: Sennheiser's 60-hour endurance plus high-end sound keep it relevant in third place even against the newer flagships.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 is the value pick
highlights.body: The fixed midrange tuning combined with the budget price makes this the headphone I send most casual buyers to.

highlights.title: AirPods Max for Apple homes
highlights.body: If you live inside iOS the Max still earns its slot despite the tired battery numbers, particularly with lossless USB-C audio.

zh-tw.commentary: 六個月對比測試終於有結論：Tom's Guide 跟 What Hi-Fi 都站 Sony WH-1000XM6 這邊，實測降噪平均把音量壓掉 87% 對比 Bose QC Ultra 的 85%，SoundGuys 也說 XM6 是 Sony 史上音質最好的 ANC 耳機，這次直接幫它分數往上拉一點。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第二沒問題，舒適度才是它的王牌，耳罩柔軟夾頭力小戴一整天最不累，跨洲際長程飛行還是它最舒服。Sennheiser Momentum 4 守第三，純音質加 60 小時電池現在還是沒對手能追，這個續航數字旗艦級就它做得出來。AirPods Max 在 iPhone 家庭裡還是首選，雖然電池數字老。Soundcore Space 2 這次跳過 Q45，新版本終於把中頻渾濁的老問題修好，這個價格我都建議朋友先收。CH-720N 是想要 Sony 牌但預算不夠的入門款。B&W PX8 守精品位，QC45 給喜歡老 Bose 音色的人，Jabra Evolve2-85 適合混合辦公族，微軟 Surface Headphones 2+ 收尾。坦白講優先買 XM6，舒適度是底線就 QC Ultra，這樣分就好。其實這個價位帶兩台都不會買錯，就看你重音質還是重舒適。

highlights.title: XM6 拿下降噪王
highlights.body: Tom's Guide 跟 What Hi-Fi 半年實測，Sony 降噪壓制力贏過 Bose，音質也更乾淨。

highlights.title: Bose 舒適度還是王
highlights.body: QC Ultra 耳罩軟夾頭力小，跨國飛行跟連坐辦公室一整天最不累，這點 Sony 追不上。

highlights.title: Momentum 4 續航無敵
highlights.body: 60 小時電池加高階音質，Sennheiser 守第三的理由很硬。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 平價首選
highlights.body: 中頻渾濁問題修好，這個價格我都建議朋友先看這台。

highlights.title: AirPods Max 守 iPhone 派
highlights.body: 蘋果生態裡還是首選，新版 USB-C 無損音訊讓它即使電池老還是有位子。

references.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra: which flagship wireless over-ears are best?
I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra: Battle of the ANC heavyweights

en.commentary: Headphones order holds steady on this Mother's Day weekend pass. Sony WH-1000XM6 is the recommendation for almost any buyer who is not married to a specific brand: the six-month head-to-head against Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 at Tom's Guide concluded the same way What Hi-Fi did, and the gap is real on commute noise plus call quality. The XM6 is also the price-stable choice. The XM5 is finally hitting clearance pricing across the major retailers and that is where I would point anyone who wants ninety percent of the experience for two thirds of the money. Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second because the comfort and call quality are still the gold standard for working people who wear headphones eight hours a day. Sennheiser Momentum 4 keeps third on pure sound quality once you turn on Sound Personalization. Apple AirPods Max with USB-C, Bowers and Wilkins Px8 S2, and the Bose QuietComfort 45 round out the slate. The Mother's Day deal worth watching is the Bose QuietComfort Ultra under three hundred dollars, which would push it ahead of the XM6 on price-per-feature for one specific weekend only.

highlights.title: XM6 still wins the cross-shop
highlights.body: Six months of head-to-head testing at Tom's Guide and What Hi-Fi land on the same answer. The gap is real on commute noise.

highlights.title: XM5 clearance is the smart spend
highlights.body: Major retailers are clearing XM5 stock now that XM6 is shipping. Ninety percent of the experience for two thirds of the price.

highlights.title: Bose Ultra owns comfort plus calls
highlights.body: All-day wear comfort and microphone clarity are still the gold standard for desk workers.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 is the audiophile pick
highlights.body: Sound Personalization unlocks the best raw audio in the slate. Worth the third-place rank for serious listeners.

highlights.title: Watch for Mother's Day Bose deals
highlights.body: Bose QC Ultra under three hundred dollars would shift the value math for this weekend specifically.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節週末再盤一次降噪頭戴耳機，順序沒動。Sony WH-1000XM6 是大部分人不被特定品牌綁住時的首選，Tom's Guide 跟 Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 對打六個月得出的結論跟 What Hi-Fi 一樣，通勤降噪加通話品質的差距是真的有感。XM6 價格也比較穩定，不太會有大波動。XM5 終於開始全通路清倉了，這個價位想要九成體驗只花三分之二的錢，就買它。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第二靠舒適度跟通話品質，每天戴八小時的上班族還是這台最舒服。Sennheiser Momentum 4 第三名拚音質，開啟 Sound Personalization 後是榜上純音質最好的。AirPods Max USB-C、Bowers and Wilkins Px8 S2、Bose QuietComfort 45 後面收尾。這週末母親節檔期值得盯的是 Bose QC Ultra 有沒有掉到台幣九千元以下，如果有就是這個週末唯一能逆轉性價比的時機。坦白說旗艦頭戴降噪這幾年差距小到不太需要糾結，挑你戴起來最舒服的那台才實在。

highlights.title: XM6 跨品牌對打仍勝出
highlights.body: Tom's Guide 和 What Hi-Fi 六個月實測都得出同樣結論，通勤情境差距明顯。

highlights.title: XM5 清倉價最划算
highlights.body: XM6 出貨後通路全面清倉 XM5，九成體驗三分之二價格，這個 CP 值難找。

highlights.title: Bose Ultra 拚舒適加通話
highlights.body: 整天戴的舒適度和麥克風清晰度，辦公族首選。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 音質派最愛
highlights.body: 開啟 Sound Personalization 後是榜上音質最好的選項。

highlights.title: 母親節盯 Bose 折扣
highlights.body: Bose QC Ultra 如果掉到台幣九千以下就是這週唯一性價比逆轉點。

references.title: Best noise-cancelling headphones 2026: tested by our expert reviewers
The best noise-cancelling headphones for 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 review: the new ANC king
Sennheiser HDB 630 review: hi-res audiophile sound with parametric EQ

en.commentary:
Sunday refresh on the headphones board with one important addition. Sennheiser's HDB 630 enters the slate at rank 12 because the audiophile-tuned wireless ANC category finally has a credible flagship. The bundled BTD 700 USB-C dongle unlocks aptX Adaptive transmission from any laptop, the parametric EQ is the deepest tuning toolset of any consumer ANC headphone in 2026, and the 60-hour battery matches Sennheiser's own Momentum 4 record. The ANC is good rather than category-leading, which is why the value score sits below the top tier despite the $500 ticket.

Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps the top spot for travelers, commuters, and anyone who wants the strongest combination of ANC depth and call clarity in 2026. The QN3 chip continues to dominate cross-shop conversations on every major review site this weekend. Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second on comfort plus call quality, and remains the right choice for desk workers who wear headphones eight hours a day. Sennheiser Momentum 4 keeps third on raw sound quality once Sound Personalization is dialed in.

Further down the list, Apple AirPods Max at four still offers the cleanest iOS integration. Soundcore Space 2 holds fifth at the entry tier with LDAC plus 50-hour battery. Space Q45, Sony WH-CH720N, Bowers and Wilkins Px8, Bose QC45, Jabra Evolve2 85, and Microsoft Surface Headphones 2+ round out the budget and office tiers in that order. Mother's Day weekend deal watch: the only price move that would shift rankings is Bose QuietComfort Ultra dropping under $300 at a flash sale. Hold buying advice steady otherwise. Memorial Day will be the next real catalyst for category pricing.

highlights.title: Sennheiser HDB 630 enters as the audiophile flagship
highlights.body: Hi-res aptX Adaptive via the bundled BTD 700 dongle, parametric EQ that runs deeper than any other consumer ANC headphone, and 60-hour battery. The right pick for buyers who put sound quality above everything else.

highlights.title: XM6 is still the top all-rounder pick
highlights.body: QN3 chip leads the ANC and call-quality conversations across every major review site this weekend. The default recommendation when budget allows.

highlights.title: Bose Ultra owns the eight-hour desk workday
highlights.body: Comfort and microphone clarity are the gold standard for office use. The right choice for buyers who wear headphones all day.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 climbs the value tier
highlights.body: LDAC plus 50-hour battery at the entry price point is the strongest dollar-for-dollar value in the rankings.

highlights.title: Watch for Bose Ultra under $300
highlights.body: A flash sale below $300 on the QC Ultra would temporarily push it ahead of the XM6 on price-per-feature for Mother's Day weekend only.

zh-tw.commentary:
週日再盤一次降噪頭戴耳機榜，這次有一個重要新成員加入。Sennheiser HDB 630 第十二名登場，發燒級無線 ANC 耳機這個分支終於有一個有說服力的旗艦。隨機附贈的 BTD 700 USB-C dongle 讓任何筆電都能輸出 aptX Adaptive 高解析訊號，內建的參數等化器是 2026 年所有消費級 ANC 耳機裡調音工具最深的一套，60 小時續航跟自家 Momentum 4 並列榜首。ANC 效果只能算不錯，沒有領先全品類，所以價格 $500 美金的 CP 值評分在旗艦段裡偏低。

Sony WH-1000XM6 維持第一，依然是出差族、通勤族、想要 2026 年最強 ANC 加通話品質組合的人首選。QN3 晶片這個週末在各大評測網站的跨品牌對打討論裡持續壓制對手。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第二，舒適度加通話品質還是辦公室戴八小時族群的標竿。Sennheiser Momentum 4 第三名，啟動 Sound Personalization 後音質也是榜上前段班。

往下看，Apple AirPods Max 第四名，iOS 整合度最高。Soundcore Space 2 穩坐第五，入門價位 LDAC 加 50 小時電池 CP 值最高。Space Q45、Sony WH-CH720N、Bowers and Wilkins Px8、Bose QC45、Jabra Evolve2 85、Microsoft Surface Headphones 2+ 依序收尾預算段跟辦公段。母親節週末折扣盯一下，唯一能改變排名的是 Bose QuietComfort Ultra 限時下殺到台幣九千以下這樣會短暫超車 XM6 的 CP 值。其他維持原本買法，下一波真正能砍價的時機要等到 Memorial Day。

highlights.title: Sennheiser HDB 630 發燒級旗艦登場
highlights.body: 附贈 BTD 700 USB-C dongle 支援 aptX Adaptive 高解析，參數等化器是所有消費級 ANC 耳機裡調音工具最深的，60 小時續航。音質擺第一的買家首選。

highlights.title: XM6 還是全能首選
highlights.body: QN3 晶片這個週末在各大評測網站跨品牌討論裡持續壓制對手，預算夠就直接買 XM6。

highlights.title: Bose Ultra 八小時辦公霸主
highlights.body: 舒適度加麥克風清晰度是辦公室戴一整天的金標準，整天戴的人首選。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 入門價最高 CP 值
highlights.body: LDAC 加 50 小時電池在入門價位裡是榜上每塊錢能買到最多功能的選項。

highlights.title: 盯 Bose Ultra 下殺台幣九千以下
highlights.body: Bose QC Ultra 母親節限時下殺到台幣九千以下，這個週末會短暫超車 XM6 的性價比。

references.title: Best noise-cancelling headphones 2026 tested
Sony WH-1000XM6 review: incremental but still the king
Bose QuietComfort Ultra long-term review

en.commentary: I sat with this list for a while after Mother's Day because I expected the Sennheiser HDB 630 to slide given how aggressive Sony's been with XM6 firmware, but the Sennheiser actually holds. The HDB 630 stays at fourth and the gap between it and Apple's AirPods Max keeps growing in Sennheiser's favor. Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps the top score because the firmware revision that landed late last week tightened up the adaptive ANC to where it now beats Bose in office HVAC conditions, a thing I never thought I'd type. Bose QuietComfort Ultra stays second on comfort alone. If you have a long-haul trip booked this summer the Ultra is still the easier choice for a 14-hour flight. Sennheiser Momentum 4 third place is correct because the new firmware that rolled out last week genuinely improved the EQ presets, and the 60-hour battery is the real-world spec that matters most. AirPods Max at fifth is the one I keep getting flak for, but I am not budging. The lack of USB-C audio passthrough on the older units and Apple's refusal to drop the launch price after three years is hard to justify in 2026. The post-Mother's-Day discounts on Soundcore Space One 2 are genuine, and at that sub-$150 sticker it is the only sub-flagship I'd buy without hesitation this week.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 now beats Bose at its own ANC game
highlights.body: The firmware update from late last week tightened the adaptive ANC profile enough that office HVAC and airplane cabin noise both come out flatter than the QC Ultra. That used to be Bose's exclusive territory.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra is still the long-haul flight pick
highlights.body: Comfort over 10 hours is non-negotiable for some buyers and Bose still wins that fight. If you fly transpacific in business this is the only correct answer.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 is the audiophile's value play
highlights.body: The May firmware improved the EQ presets meaningfully and you still get 60 hours of battery. Sound quality at this price point has no real rival.

highlights.title: AirPods Max remains overpriced for what 2026 demands
highlights.body: No audiophile USB-C support on the older units, no new color this spring, and Apple still asks launch pricing. I'd skip these unless you're fully in the Apple lock-in.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space One 2 is the best post-holiday value buy
highlights.body: At its discounted price right now this is the only sub-flagship ANC can I'd hand to a friend without caveats. The battery genuinely lasts the work week on one charge.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節後我重看了一輪這張表，本來覺得 Sennheiser HDB 630 可能要往下掉，因為 Sony XM6 韌體更新得很猛，結果 HDB 630 守住了第四，跟 AirPods Max 的差距還在拉大。Sony WH-1000XM6 我繼續放第一，上週末那版韌體把適應性 ANC 收得更緊，辦公室冷氣這種環境居然比 Bose 還乾淨，我自己都沒想到會寫這句話。Bose QC Ultra 第二，純粹靠舒適度撐住。今年夏天要飛長程的，講真的選 Ultra 不會錯，連戴 14 小時還是 Bose 最舒服。Sennheiser Momentum 4 第三，上週韌體把 EQ 預設值修得有感，60 小時電量是台灣讀者通勤一週都不用充電的水準，這個 CP 值放在這位置剛好。AirPods Max 第五，老實說我被罵很多次了，但我不會改，舊款沒有 USB-C 音訊直通、上市三年了 Apple 連個降價都不肯，2026 年這價格說真的講不過去。Soundcore Space One 2 母親節後折扣是真的，NT$4,500 上下能買到這個 ANC，這週我會推朋友直接下手，沒什麼好猶豫。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 連 Bose 最強的 ANC 都贏了
highlights.body: 上週版韌體把適應性 ANC 調得更緊，辦公室冷氣跟飛機艙噪音壓得比 QC Ultra 還平。其實這塊本來是 Bose 的看家本領，現在被掀桌了。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 還是長程飛行的王者
highlights.body: 連戴 10 小時舒適度這件事，Bose 還是沒人能比。今年夏天要飛美國商務艙的就買它，這個答案很乾淨。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 是發燒友 CP 值之選
highlights.body: 5 月韌體把 EQ 預設修得很有感，60 小時電量在台灣通勤環境一週充一次就夠。這個價位音質沒對手，我自己會選它。

highlights.title: AirPods Max 2026 年這價格真的太硬
highlights.body: 舊款不支援 USB-C 音訊、今年春季也沒新色、Apple 還是首發定價。坦白講除非你 Apple 生態系深陷其中，不然別買。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space One 2 是母親節後最佳撿便宜選擇
highlights.body: 現在這個折扣價，這支是唯一一個我不用加任何但書就敢推朋友的非旗艦。電量真的撐得到週末，不用每天充。

references.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 May firmware adds adaptive ANC for transit
Bose QuietComfort Ultra firmware fixes Bluetooth multipoint
Apple AirPods Max USB-C firmware brings lossless to Vision Pro

en.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 holds first and the firmware update this week adds adaptive ANC for transit environments. The XM6 was already class-leading on ANC; this firmware extends the lead in the noisiest real-world environments that matter most for commuters. First place locked in. Bose QuietComfort Ultra shipped a firmware fix for Bluetooth multipoint switching that was the most consistent complaint since launch. Score holds, second place unchanged. Sennheiser Momentum 4 stays at third on sound quality. Sennheiser HDB 630 holds fourth. Apple AirPods Max USB-C got a firmware push this week enabling lossless audio over USB-C to Vision Pro, which is a small but real story for users in that ecosystem. Score holds. Soundcore Space 2, Soundcore Space Q45, and Sony WH-CH720N are unchanged. The premium tier is stable; the value-tier story is the same as it has been all year.

highlights.title: Sony XM6 adaptive ANC firmware extends the transit lead
highlights.body: Adaptive ANC for noisy transit environments is exactly the use case where ANC differences actually matter. The XM6 was already class-leading; this firmware extends the lead. First place locked in for commuters.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Bluetooth multipoint fix removes the last complaint
highlights.body: Multipoint switching firmware fix addresses the most consistent complaint since launch. Bose's comfort and ANC story is unchanged; this fix just removes the durable annoyance. Second place locked in.

highlights.title: AirPods Max USB-C Vision Pro lossless is niche but real
highlights.body: Lossless audio over USB-C to Vision Pro is a small story for the Apple ecosystem but a real one for spatial audio creators and Vision Pro power users. Score holds; this is a feature update, not a ranking change.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WH-1000XM6 守住第一，這禮拜韌體加入交通環境的適應性主動降噪。XM6 本來在 ANC 就是分類冠軍，這個韌體在通勤者最在乎的真實吵雜環境把領先拉開。第一名鎖定。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra 這禮拜推出韌體修正藍牙多點切換問題，這是上市以來最持續被抱怨的點。分數守住，第二名不動。Sennheiser Momentum 4 守第三，靠音質。Sennheiser HDB 630 守第四。

Apple AirPods Max USB-C 這禮拜韌體推送，啟用 USB-C 對 Vision Pro 的無損音訊，這對 Apple 生態用戶是小但實在的更新。分數守住。

Soundcore Space 2、Soundcore Space Q45、Sony WH-CH720N 都沒動。

高階段很穩，C/P 值段今年的故事一直沒變。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 適應性 ANC 韌體拉開通勤領先
highlights.body: 交通吵雜環境的適應性 ANC 正是 ANC 差距真的有意義的使用情境。XM6 本來就是分類冠軍，這個韌體把領先拉開。通勤者首選第一名鎖定。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 多點切換修好之後最後一個抱怨消失
highlights.body: 多點切換韌體修正解決上市以來最持續被抱怨的點。Bose 的舒適度跟 ANC 故事沒變，這次只是把持續的小煩惱修掉。第二名鎖定。

highlights.title: AirPods Max USB-C Vision Pro 無損是小眾但實在
highlights.body: USB-C 對 Vision Pro 的無損音訊對 Apple 生態用戶是小故事，但對空間音訊創作者跟 Vision Pro 重度用戶是真的有意義。分數守住，這是功能更新不是排名變動。

references.title: I tested AirPods Max 2, Sony WH-1000XM6, and Bose QuietComfort Ultra, the only pair I would keep
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra vs Sony WH-1000XM5
Sennheiser MOMENTUM 4 nearly half off, outlasts WH-1000XM6 on battery

en.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 stays first and the Tom's Guide head-to-head this week with AirPods Max 2 and Bose QuietComfort Ultra lands where I land: the XM6 is the one you keep. Adaptive NC Optimizer with the new QN3 processor measurably outperforms the Bose ANC on planes, the 12-mic array fixes the call-quality complaint that dogged the XM5, and the 30-hour battery is enough for any real-world travel schedule. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second and the comfort story is still its own argument. Anyone with a small head or who wears glasses should try Bose before committing to Sony, and the QC Ultra's spatial audio implementation is genuinely better for music than Sony's. Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless at third got a price drop on Amazon this week to nearly half off, which makes it the best value proposition in the entire top-five segment. 60-hour battery, best-in-class sound quality, and now under $250 is hard to argue with for anyone who does not need category-leading ANC. Apple AirPods Max 2 stays at fifth because the USB-C lossless story matters for Vision Pro users but the weight is still the friction point that keeps it from rising. Sennheiser HDB 630 at fourth is the audiophile pick and unchanged. Bose QC 45 and the rest of the back half are stable. Memorial Day will not move the top three but watch for Momentum 4 to dip again next week.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 is the one you keep, Tom's Guide confirms
highlights.body: Head-to-head with AirPods Max 2 and Bose QuietComfort Ultra lands where I land. Adaptive NC Optimizer with QN3 processor outperforms Bose ANC on planes, 12-mic array fixes the XM5 call-quality complaint, 30-hour battery is enough for any travel schedule. First place is decisive.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 at nearly half off is the value play of the week
highlights.body: Amazon drop puts the Momentum 4 under $250 with 60-hour battery and best-in-class sound. If category-leading ANC is not the priority, this is the smartest spend in the entire top-five segment right now. Watch for it to dip again next week.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra still wins on comfort and music spatial
highlights.body: Anyone with a small head or who wears glasses should try Bose before committing to Sony. The QC Ultra's spatial audio for music is genuinely better than Sony's implementation. Second place is earned, not just inherited.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WH-1000XM6 守第一，這禮拜 Tom's Guide 跟 AirPods Max 2、Bose QuietComfort Ultra 三方對決的結論跟我一致：XM6 是你會留下的那一支。新的 QN3 處理器配適應性 NC 優化器，飛機上實測壓過 Bose 的 ANC，12 麥克風陣列把 XM5 一直被抱怨的通話品質補起來，30 小時電池涵蓋任何真實旅遊行程。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第二，舒適度是它自己的論述。頭比較小或戴眼鏡的人，在下手 Sony 之前應該先試 Bose，QC Ultra 的音樂空間音訊實作真的比 Sony 好。

Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless 排第三，這禮拜 Amazon 降價將近半價，整個前五名 C/P 值最高就是它。60 小時電池、分類最強音質、現在低於 NT$7,500，不需要分類冠軍 ANC 的話這個無腦下手。

Apple AirPods Max 2 守第五，USB-C 無損故事對 Vision Pro 使用者有意義，但重量還是它升不上去的關鍵。Sennheiser HDB 630 排第四，音響派首選沒動。Bose QC 45 跟後段都穩。國殤日不會動前三名，但 Momentum 4 下禮拜可能還會再殺一波。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 是你會留下的那一支，Tom's Guide 確認
highlights.body: 跟 AirPods Max 2 跟 Bose QuietComfort Ultra 三方對決結論跟我一致。QN3 配適應性 NC 優化器飛機上實測壓過 Bose，12 麥克風陣列補好 XM5 通話品質抱怨，30 小時電池涵蓋任何旅遊行程。第一名差距很明確。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 將近半價是這禮拜 C/P 值王
highlights.body: Amazon 降到低於 NT$7,500、60 小時電池、分類最強音質。不需要分類冠軍 ANC 的話，整個前五名最聰明的花錢方式就是它。下禮拜可能還會再殺一波。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 在舒適度跟音樂空間音訊還是勝
highlights.body: 頭小或戴眼鏡的人下手 Sony 之前先試 Bose。QC Ultra 的音樂空間音訊真的比 Sony 實作好。第二名靠實力站住，不靠繼承。

references.title: Best noise cancelling headphones 2026 RTINGS
Sony WH-1000XM6 review
Best noise cancelling headphones Memorial Day

en.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 holds first on Tuesday and the bigger signal today is that the $399 Memorial Day price now appears at both B&H and Crutchfield, which means the deal is wide enough to count on through the rest of the week. The HD Noise Cancelling Processor QN3 plus the upgraded driver structure is still the combination that delivers measurable ANC improvement over the XM5 generation, and the gap to the Bose QC Ultra Gen 2 holds at roughly $50. Bose QuietComfort Ultra Gen 2 at second still wins the raw ANC measurement, which matters for the long-haul flight and severe-noise buyer, but the comfort and sound trade-offs over long sessions are still why second is correct, not first. Apple AirPods Max 2026 at third gets the H3 chip plus the April spatial audio refinement and the $549 price still requires iPhone ecosystem buy-in to justify. Bowers and Wilkins Px8 S2 at fourth holds the audiophile-at-home pick on the upgraded wired mode. Sennheiser Momentum 4 in mid-pack holds on long battery life. Sony WH-CH720N remains the right budget anti-Bose pick. The Tuesday verdict is Sony XM6 at $399 if you can stretch, Bose for flights, and skip the entry tier unless you really cannot wait until July.

highlights.title: Sony XM6 at $399 now stocked at B&H and Crutchfield
highlights.body: Memorial Day pricing widened to multiple retailers overnight. The deal is now wide enough to count on through the rest of the week. New QN3 processor plus upgraded driver structure delivers measurable ANC improvement over XM5. First place is decisive.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra Gen 2 still strongest ANC measurement
highlights.body: Strongest ANC reading in the category is still the right pick for long-haul flights and severe noise scenarios. Comfort and sound trade-offs versus Sony on extended wear are real, which is why second place is correct. Flight buyers should ignore the Sony price gap.

highlights.title: AirPods Max 2026 H3 chip plus April spatial audio refinement
highlights.body: April firmware delivered spatial audio refinement that finally justifies the iPhone premium for buyers who watch Apple TV+ and Disney+ content regularly. $549 is steep but the integration argument is now intact. Third place holds for the iPhone ecosystem.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜二 Sony WH-1000XM6 守第一，今天比較大的訊號是 NT$12,800 國殤日定價同時在 B&H 跟 Crutchfield 上架，這檔活動廣度足以撐到本週結束。HD Noise Cancelling Processor QN3 加升級驅動單體結構還是讓 XM5 世代有可量測 ANC 改善的組合，跟 Bose QC Ultra Gen 2 的價差守在 NT$1,500 左右。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra Gen 2 第二還是贏原始 ANC 量測，對長途飛行跟嚴重噪音的買家有差，但長時間配戴的舒適度跟音色取捨還是讓它停在第二、不是第一。

Apple AirPods Max 2026 第三吃 H3 晶片加四月空間音訊改良，NT$17,500 還是要 iPhone 生態系撐溢價。

Bowers and Wilkins Px8 S2 第四守在家發燒友之選靠有線模式升級。Sennheiser Momentum 4 中段守長續航論述。Sony WH-CH720N 還是對的預算反 Bose 推薦。

禮拜二判斷：能拉到 NT$12,800 就買 Sony XM6、長途飛行買 Bose、入門級除非真的撐不到七月不然跳過。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 NT$12,800 B&H 跟 Crutchfield 同步上架
highlights.body: 國殤日定價昨晚擴到多家零售商。這檔活動廣度足以撐到本週結束。新 QN3 處理器加升級驅動單體結構對 XM5 來說是可量測 ANC 改善。第一名很明確。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra Gen 2 還是 ANC 量測最強
highlights.body: 分類 ANC 讀數最強對長途飛行跟嚴重噪音情境還是對的。跟 Sony 在長時間配戴的舒適度跟音色取捨是真的，所以第二名才對。飛行買家不用管 Sony 的價差。

highlights.title: AirPods Max 2026 H3 晶片加四月空間音訊改良
highlights.body: 四月韌體推送的空間音訊改良終於撐住 iPhone 溢價，常看 Apple TV+ 跟 Disney+ 的買家有差。NT$17,500 不便宜但整合論述現在站得住。iPhone 生態系第三名守住。

The New Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise-Canceling Headphones: How To Buy Online

Bose QuietComfort Ultra Gen 2 at second still wins the raw ANC measurement for the long-haul flight buyer, but the comfort and sound trade-offs over long sessions keep it at second. Apple AirPods Max 2026 at third gets the H3 chip plus April spatial audio refinement and the $549 price still requires iPhone ecosystem buy-in. Bowers and Wilkins Px8 S2 at fourth holds the audiophile-at-home pick on the upgraded wired mode. Sennheiser Momentum 4 in mid-pack holds on long battery life. highlights.title: Sony launched Sandstone XM6 at $399.99 with $30 gift card
highlights.body: Sony introduced a Sandstone colorway today at $399.99 with a free $30 Sony electronics credit, effective sub-$370 net price on the newest SKU. Amazon matched at $398 with a $30 Amazon credit and Best Buy continues with Black at $398 through Sunday. The deal is widening into midweek which signals healthy supply.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra Gen 2 still strongest ANC measurement

highlights.title: AirPods Max 2026 H3 chip plus April spatial audio holds third

en.commentary: Friday and the over-ear category is where the Memorial Day discount math actually pays off. Sony WH-1000XM6 holds first and Amazon dropped it to $349 this morning, the lowest tracked price since launch, the QN3 chip plus the new 30-hour battery rating are the right flagship pitch and at $349 the ANC depth gap to AirPods Max stops being defensible at three times the price. Bose QuietComfort Ultra Gen 2 stays second at $379 across Best Buy and Bose direct, the Immersive Audio update from the April firmware push is the reason I keep it ahead of the Sennheiser Momentum 4. Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless holds third at $279, the 60-hour battery is still in another universe and the buttery custom tuning via the Smart Control app is the reason audiophiles who do not want Apple defaults pick this one. AirPods Max with USB-C did not move into the discount window this round and that is why I keep them at fourth even at $479 Apple Renewed, the H1 chip is showing its age against XM6 and the lightning-fast iPhone pairing is the only remaining reason to spend that delta. Bowers and Wilkins Px8 hold fifth as the luxury audiophile bracket at $529, no MD discount on these because B&W never plays the holiday game. Verdict for Friday: WH-1000XM6 at $349 is the buy of the weekend in this category, full stop. Anyone shopping Bose for the ANC edge can defend the $30 premium for QC Ultra Gen 2, anyone shopping pure music can save $70 on Momentum 4 and still walk away happy.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 at $349 is the buy of the weekend
highlights.body: All-time tracked low on Amazon Friday morning, the QN3 chip plus 30-hour battery rating make this the right flagship pitch, and the ANC depth gap to AirPods Max stops being defensible when Max is three times the price. No reason to wait for Monday on this one.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra Gen 2 holds $379 with the April firmware win
highlights.body: The Immersive Audio update from the April push fixed the spatial render and the head-tracking lag, which is the only reason I keep Bose ahead of Sennheiser. At $379 the ANC depth still leads the category and the comfort over long flights is unmatched.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 at $279 is the audiophile-saver
highlights.body: Sixty hours of battery is in another universe and the custom EQ via the Smart Control app delivers the closest thing to a wired studio tuning in the wireless segment. At $279 this saves $70 over yesterday and is the right call for buyers prioritizing music over ANC.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜五，頭戴式耳機這個品類才是國殤日折扣算數真的划算的地方。

Sony WH-1000XM6 守第一，Amazon 今天早上砍到 NT$10,990，從上市以來的歷史新低，QN3 晶片加上新的 30 小時電池規格，是對的旗艦定位，到了 NT$10,990 跟 AirPods Max 之間的 ANC 深度差距，在 Max 賣它三倍價的前提下，已經完全站不住腳了。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra Gen 2 第二守住 NT$11,990 在 Best Buy 跟 Bose 美國官網，四月韌體推送的 Immersive Audio 更新，是我把它擺在 Sennheiser Momentum 4 前面的理由。Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless 第三 NT$8,790，60 小時電池還在另一個世界，Smart Control App 細膩的客製化調音是聽音樂派裡不想用 Apple 預設值的人選它的原因。

AirPods Max USB-C 這輪沒進折扣窗口，所以即使整新機 NT$15,200 我還是維持它第四，H1 晶片在 XM6 面前老態畢露，閃電配對 iPhone 是現在唯一還能撐這個價差的理由。Bowers and Wilkins Px8 第五當奢華發燒友檔，NT$16,900 沒有國殤日折扣，B&W 從來不玩節慶這套。

禮拜五結論：WH-1000XM6 NT$10,990 是這個品類國殤日週末的買點，沒得議。要 Bose 的 ANC 邊際優勢可以接受 NT$1,000 溢價，純聽音樂的人選 Momentum 4 省 NT$2,200 還能滿足走人。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 落到 NT$10,990 是這檔週末買點
highlights.body: Amazon 禮拜五早上的歷史追蹤新低，QN3 晶片加 30 小時電池規格是對的旗艦定位。Max 賣三倍價，ANC 深度差距已經站不住腳。這個型號不必等到禮拜一了。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra Gen 2 守 NT$11,990 靠四月韌體拉回

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 NT$8,790 是發燒友省錢解
