references.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 Review: A New Reference for ANC
Memorial Day Headphone Deals 2026: Final Day to Save on Sony, Bose, Apple
AirPods Max 2 (USB-C) Long-Term Review

en.commentary: Memorial Day weekend is wrapping up and Sunday is the cleanest window to lock in a flagship ANC purchase before Tuesday pricing resets. Sony's WH-1000XM6 holds the top spot with the QN3 chip delivering the fastest adaptive cancellation I've measured this year, a foldable frame that actually fits a carry-on pocket, and LDAC support that still matters for Android listeners chasing high-resolution streams. At $349 it's the rare flagship that earned its asking price on day one. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra remains the right call for travelers who care most about real-world chaos, since ActiveSense reacts to airport gate announcements and HVAC drones with a calmness Sony only matches in steady cabin noise. Sennheiser's Momentum 4 keeps owning the battery race at 60 hours, which is the spec that quietly defines whether headphones live on your head or in a charging cradle. Apple's AirPods Max 2 finally feels like a true generational refresh, with the H2 chip pulling 1.5x more attenuation and USB-C lossless restoring credibility with iOS power users. Budget shoppers have it better than ever this Sunday. Soundcore's Space Q45 packs LDAC and 50-hour stamina under a hundred bucks, and Sony's WH-CH720N gives you the brand's tuning at 192 grams for $150. The honest read on the final day of the holiday window is straightforward. Pick the tier that matches how you actually listen, hit checkout before Monday evening, and you will skip the post-holiday markup cycle entirely.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 is the cleanest flagship buy
highlights.body: The QN3 chip, foldable frame, and LDAC support make $349 feel like a bargain for a 2026 reference-grade ANC headphone.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra owns unpredictable noise
highlights.body: ActiveSense adapts instantly to gate announcements and HVAC swings, which is exactly what frequent flyers need from a $449 pair.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space Q45 wins the under-$100 bracket
highlights.body: LDAC plus 50 hours of battery at this price gives budget shoppers a genuine flagship-feature experience for Sunday checkout.

zh-tw.commentary: 美國連假進入第三天，週日是台灣玩家跨海下單最划算的時間點，台幣訂價普遍跟著促銷檔走，週二一過大概就會回到原價。Sony WH-1000XM6 穩穩坐在第一名，QN3 晶片的自適應降噪反應速度真的快了一截，可折疊設計帶出國塞登機包整個輕鬆，LDAC 高解析音訊對 Android 用戶來說還是有感，台幣一萬三千多買到 2026 年最完整的 ANC 旗艦，老實講很划算。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 還是長途班機跟開放辦公室的首選，ActiveSense 動態降噪面對突發噪音那種臨場感，Sony 在均勻艙噪以外的場景還追不太上，台幣一萬五千多買的是穩定感。Sennheiser Momentum 4 拿下電池續航冠軍，60 小時這個數字大概是這份榜單最實用的規格，常出差的人一週充一次就好。Apple AirPods Max 2 終於有升級的感覺，H2 晶片把降噪拉升 1.5 倍，USB-C 無損音訊讓 iOS 重度用戶總算有個交代，台灣 Apple Store 正式販售保固完整。預算族今天最爽，Soundcore Space Q45 台幣三千多直接給你 LDAC 加 50 小時，Sony WH-CH720N 四千多買得到原廠調音加 192 克輕量機身。週日下午下單，趕在週一晚上前刷卡完成，差不多就能避開連假後的價格修正。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 旗艦首選
highlights.body: QN3 晶片降噪、可折疊設計加 LDAC，台幣一萬三千多在 2026 年的 ANC 市場找不到更完整的方案。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 動態降噪實戰王
highlights.body: ActiveSense 對機場廣播跟冷氣轟鳴反應快，台幣一萬五千多換來的是長途班機跟開放辦公室的安寧。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space Q45 預算神機
highlights.body: 台幣三千出頭給你 LDAC 加 50 小時電池，週日下單是這個檔期最划算的入門選擇。

references.title: Father's Day 2026 ANC Headphone Gift Guide: Sony, Bose, Apple Compared
Sony WH-1000XM6 Post-Memorial Day Pricing Holds at $349
Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless Long-Term Review

en.commentary: Friday morning four days after Memorial Day and the over-ear ANC board is exactly where I left it Tuesday. Sony WH-1000XM6 bounced back to $399 from the holiday $349 floor, Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds at $429, and Sennheiser Momentum 4 sits at $329. The reset went textbook clean, and the next promotional window opens with Father's Day on June 21. Over-ear headphones are the single most reliable Father's Day audio gift in my eight years of tracking this category, so I expect targeted promotions on every flagship before mid-June. The conviction call for the Friday shopper is this: if you missed Memorial Day, do not panic-buy the XM6 at $399 today. Sony almost always promotes WH flagships for Father's Day with a $30 to $50 trim, which puts the XM6 back near $349 within three weeks. The Bose QC Ultra is the harder call because Bose treats Father's Day as a tier-two window and historically only trims $20 to $30, but $429 with the ActiveSense advantage in unpredictable noise is still defensible for frequent flyers. Sennheiser Momentum 4 at $329 with 60-hour battery is the value flagship of this list and the right gift for a dad who hates charging cables. For Apple households the AirPods Max 2 at $549 stays the integration play and Apple rarely promotes it outside back-to-school. Budget shoppers should jump on Soundcore Space Q45 at $79 since it dropped to that floor for Memorial Day and Anker may not repeat the cut until October. Pick the bracket, set price alerts, and let Father's Day do the work.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 at $399 is the Father's Day waiting play
highlights.body: Bounced $50 off the Memorial Day floor and Sony historically promotes WH flagships for Father's Day with a $30 to $50 trim. Expect $349 again on Father's Day weekend and possibly $329 if Amazon runs an early Prime Day promo in mid-June. Today's $399 reflects the QN3 chip and LDAC pipeline so it is fair, but patience pays.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra at $429 is the unpredictable-noise commit
highlights.body: Bose rarely promotes QC Ultra units outside Black Friday and the $429 sticker reflects the ActiveSense advantage on gate announcements, HVAC drones, and cabin chaos that Sony only matches on steady noise. For dads who fly weekly, this is the gift you commit to today and skip the waiting game. Father's Day might trim $20 but that is the ceiling.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 at $329 owns the battery game
highlights.body: 60 hours of real-world playback in a comfortable frame with the cleanest Sennheiser tuning I have measured this year. For a Father's Day gift, this is the SKU that buyers underrate and recipients love because charging anxiety disappears entirely. Sennheiser may trim to $299 around Father's Day but the current $329 is still a justifiable buy if you need it sooner.

zh-tw.commentary: 禮拜五早上，國殤日結束第四天，包耳式 ANC 榜跟禮拜二離開時一樣。Sony WH-1000XM6 從連假價 NT$10,900 彈回 NT$12,490，Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守 NT$13,490，Sennheiser Momentum 4 NT$10,290。重置走得乾淨俐落，下一波促銷窗口就是 6/21 父親節。我追蹤這個類別八年，包耳式 ANC 耳機在台灣是父親節最穩定的音訊類禮物，6 月中以前每支旗艦應該都會出針對性促銷。週五給大家的判斷是這樣，沒在連假下手的人今天不要用 NT$12,490 衝 XM6。Sony 父親節幾乎都會降 NT$1,000 到 NT$1,600，三週內 XM6 回到 NT$10,900 的機率超高。Bose QC Ultra 比較難說，Bose 把父親節當第二級促銷窗口，過往大概只降 NT$600 到 NT$1,000，但 NT$13,490 配上 ActiveSense 動態降噪的優勢，常出差的爸爸值得。Sennheiser Momentum 4 NT$10,290 帶 60 小時電池，是這份榜單的 CP 旗艦，討厭充電線的爸爸送這支最對位。Apple 家庭 AirPods Max 2 NT$17,900 是生態整合首選，Apple 開學季以外很少促銷。預算族直接衝 Soundcore Space Q45 NT$2,490，連假地板價守住，Anker 下次再降可能要到 10 月。挑好預算帶，設好價格警示，讓父親節去工作。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 NT$12,490 是父親節等待戰
highlights.body: 從連假地板彈回 NT$1,600，Sony 歷年父親節都會針對 WH 旗艦降 NT$1,000 到 NT$1,600。預期父親節週末回到 NT$10,900，Amazon 6 月中辦 Prime Day 預熱的話 NT$10,290 都有機會。今天 NT$12,490 對得起 QN3 晶片跟 LDAC 管線，但耐心會給你回報。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra NT$13,490 是動態降噪直接下手位置
highlights.body: Bose QC Ultra 黑五以外很少促銷，NT$13,490 對應的是面對機場廣播、冷氣轟鳴、艙噪這些不規則噪音的 ActiveSense 優勢，Sony 在均勻噪音以外還追不太上。每週飛行的爸爸就今天直接下單，父親節大概也只降 NT$600 跑不掉。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 NT$10,290 電池續航王
highlights.body: 60 小時實測續航塞進舒服頭帶，Sennheiser 今年最乾淨的調音。送父親節禮物這支是大家低估、收到的人最開心的型號，充電焦慮直接消失。Sennheiser 父親節可能降到 NT$9,490，但急著用的話今天這個價也合理。

references.title: Best ANC Headphones 2026: Saturday Test
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QC Ultra: Final Verdict
Father's Day Headphone Gift Picks

en.commentary:
Saturday May 30 keeps Sony WH-1000XM6 at the top of the ANC headphone ranking because the noise cancellation, sound quality, and 30-hour battery life combination remains unmatched at $399. Sony is not running Father's Day promotions, and the price held flat at Amazon, Best Buy, and Sony direct through Saturday. For dads who fly more than 10 times per year or commute on noisy trains, the XM6 is the unambiguous gift.

Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second at $429 on the noise cancellation that still edges Sony in the deepest low-frequency rumble. Sennheiser Momentum 4 holds third at $329 on the sound quality that audiophiles consistently rank higher than Sony or Bose, and the 60-hour battery life makes the Momentum the right call for international travelers.

Sennheiser HDB 630 holds fourth at $499 on the premium audiophile bracket with the four-DAC architecture that powers reference-quality wired and wireless playback. AirPods Max hold fifth at $549 on the H2 chip iPhone integration and the lossless audio over USB-C added in the late-2025 refresh. Saturday Father's Day gift orders are pulling the Sony XM6 and the Bose QC Ultra into carts at the highest rate this week. Amazon Prime cutoff for Father's Day delivery is June 14, and the gift-buyer commit window is widening into next week.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 at $399 is the frequent-flyer Father's Day gift
highlights.body: Noise cancellation, sound quality, and 30-hour battery at $399 remain unmatched. Sony does not run Father's Day promos so $399 today is what buyers will see through June 21. For dads who fly 10-plus times per year or commute on noisy trains, the XM6 is the unambiguous pick. Amazon Prime Father's Day cutoff is June 14.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra at $429 edges Sony on deep-rumble cancellation
highlights.body: Bose still owns the deepest low-frequency rumble cancellation, which matters specifically for aircraft cabin and subway commute use. For buyers who prioritize the absolute ANC ceiling over sound quality or battery life, Bose is the rational pick. The post-Memorial Day pricing held flat through Saturday.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 at $329 is the audiophile travel pick
highlights.body: Sound quality audiophiles consistently rank higher than Sony or Bose, plus 60-hour battery for international travelers. For dads who care about audio fidelity more than ANC absolute ceiling, the Momentum 4 is the rational call at $70 less than the Sony XM6.

zh-tw.commentary:
5/30 星期六把 Sony WH-1000XM6 留在 ANC 耳罩耳機排名第一，因為降噪、音質、30 小時電力組合在 USD$399（NT$13,290）還是無人能敵。Sony 不做父親節促銷，價格在 Amazon、Best Buy、Sony 官網守到星期六。一年飛 10 次以上或搭吵雜火車通勤的爸爸，XM6 是不容質疑的禮物。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第二 USD$429（NT$14,290），降噪在最深的低頻轟鳴還是略勝 Sony。Sennheiser Momentum 4 守第三 USD$329（NT$10,990），音質發燒友持續排得比 Sony 或 Bose 高，60 小時電力讓 Momentum 是國際旅客的正確選擇。

Sennheiser HDB 630 守第四 USD$499（NT$16,590）高階發燒組，四 DAC 架構驅動參考級有線無線播放。AirPods Max 守第五 USD$549（NT$18,290），H2 晶片 iPhone 整合加 2025 年底更新加入的 USB-C 無損音訊。星期六父親節禮物訂單這週把 Sony XM6 跟 Bose QC Ultra 拉進購物車最猛。Amazon Prime 父親節到貨截止 6/14，禮物買家的下單窗口正在擴大到下週。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 NT$13,290 是常飛爸爸的父親節禮物
highlights.body: 降噪、音質、30 小時電力在 USD$399 無人能敵。Sony 不做父親節促銷，今天 NT$13,290 就是 6/21 前的價格。一年飛 10 次以上或搭吵雜火車通勤的爸爸，XM6 是不容質疑的選擇。Amazon Prime 父親節到貨截止 6/14。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra NT$14,290 在深頻轟鳴勝過 Sony
highlights.body: Bose 在最深的低頻轟鳴降噪還是領先，這個對飛機艙跟地鐵通勤特別重要。重視 ANC 絕對天花板超過音質或電力的買家，Bose 是理性選擇。國殤日後價格守到星期六沒動。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 NT$10,990 是發燒友旅行首選
highlights.body: 音質發燒友持續排得比 Sony 或 Bose 高、60 小時電力給國際旅客。重視音質超過 ANC 絕對天花板的爸爸，Momentum 4 是理性選擇，比 Sony XM6 便宜 NT$2,300。

references.title: Best Noise Cancelling Headphones 2026: Sony XM6, Bose, AirPods Max Compared
The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months — clear winner

en.commentary:
Sunday May 31, Sony WH-1000XM6 holds the top position in over-ear noise-cancelling headphones and the case is straightforward. The XM6 delivers the best measured ANC of any over-ear headphone tested this year with 12 microphones handling adaptive noise cancellation and a 10-band EQ in Sony's app that is simply unmatched. 30 hours of battery life means a full week of office use without reaching for the charging cable. At $349 it is the premium recommendation for anyone who wants maximum control over their listening experience.

Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones holds second at $379. Bose wins on comfort: the padded earcups and headband fatigue more slowly over all-day sessions than the Sony, and the QC Ultra's tuning is relaxed and easy to live with for entire workdays. On long-haul flights, the Bose remains the traveler's choice for ANC consistency and physical comfort over 10-plus hours. Father's Day approaches June 21, and Best Buy is running a Bose Father's Day sale that makes this a realistic $349 purchase this weekend.

Sennheiser Momentum 4 holds third at $279 with the best measured sound quality of any headphone in this group and a 60-hour battery that makes it the battery champion. For buyers who put sound fidelity above ANC intensity, Sennheiser is the correct recommendation. The Sennheiser HD B 630 holds fourth with outstanding audio performance suited for the discerning listener.

Father's Day on June 21 is driving premium headphone searches and purchases. Best Buy's Bose promotional pricing and Amazon's XM6 availability make both the top two picks accessible through standard shipping cutoffs this week.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 at $349 is the best ANC headphone you can buy today
highlights.body: 12 microphones, a 10-band EQ, and 30-hour battery put the XM6 ahead of every competitor on technical merit. For buyers who want maximum control over their listening experience, Sony is the choice. Amazon availability and standard shipping makes this a viable Father's Day purchase this week.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra at $379 with Best Buy Father's Day sale is the comfort traveler pick
highlights.body: Bose wins on all-day physical comfort with amply padded earcups that outlast Sony on long sessions. Best Buy's Father's Day Bose promotion makes $349 pricing realistic this weekend. For dads who travel frequently, the QC Ultra's relaxed tuning and superior comfort are the correct tradeoff.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 at $279 leads on sound quality and battery
highlights.body: The Momentum 4 has the best measured sound quality in the group and a 60-hour battery that is unmatched. For buyers prioritizing audio fidelity over ANC intensity, Sennheiser is the recommendation. At $279 it also represents the best value in the top three.

zh-tw.commentary:
5/31 星期日 Sony WH-1000XM6 守住降噪耳機第一，理由很清楚。XM6 搭載 12 組麥克風的自適應降噪，音質調整有 10 段 EQ，是今年測試過測量降噪表現最好的耳罩式耳機。30 小時電池夠用整週辦公不充電。USD$349（約 NT$11,590）是最大化聆聽控制體驗的首選推薦。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones 守第二 USD$379（約 NT$12,590）。Bose 在舒適度上贏，加厚耳墊跟頭帶整天配戴的疲勞感比 Sony 慢，QC Ultra 的調音放鬆好入耳，整個工作日或長途飛行都能撐住。Best Buy 這週末有 Bose 父親節優惠，USD$349（約 NT$11,590）是現實價格，適合買給常出差的爸爸。

Sennheiser Momentum 4 守第三 USD$279（約 NT$9,290），音質測量表現是這個榜單裡最好的，60 小時電池是電池王者。把音質擺在降噪強度之前的買家，Sennheiser 是正確推薦。Sennheiser HD B 630 守第四，音頻表現出色，適合挑剔的聆聽者。父親節 6/21 推動了高端耳機的搜尋跟購買，Best Buy 的 Bose 促銷跟 Amazon 的 XM6 現貨讓這兩款都能趕上這週的到貨截止。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 NT$11,590，今天能買到的最強降噪耳機
highlights.body: 12 組麥克風、10 段 EQ、30 小時電池，技術面全面領先競品。想要最大化聆聽控制的買家，Sony 是答案。Amazon 有現貨，這週標準運送趕得上父親節到貨截止。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra NT$11,590 含 Best Buy 父親節優惠，旅行舒適首選
highlights.body: 加厚耳墊讓 Bose 在長時間配戴上勝過 Sony，Best Buy 父親節促銷讓 NT$11,590 成為現實價格。常出差的爸爸，QC Ultra 放鬆的調音加上優越舒適度是正確的取捨。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 NT$9,290，音質跟電池雙冠
highlights.body: Momentum 4 音質測量是榜單裡最好的，60 小時電池無人能及。把音質擺在降噪前面的買家，Sennheiser 是推薦。NT$9,290 也是前三名裡最好的 CP 值。

references.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 vs. Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 Headphones: Review
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones (2nd Gen): which flagship is best?
I tested the AirPods Max 2, Sony WH-1000XM6, and Bose QuietComfort Ultra

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps my number one spot, and the latest head-to-heads against the Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2nd Gen reinforce why. Sony brought back folding hinges with a stainless steel mechanism so the XM6 collapses into a ball for travel, and the call quality is the standout, with beamforming AI and precise voice pickup that genuinely cuts background noise on calls. At $449 it sits at the top of the price ladder, but the all-round package of sound, cancellation, and software still leads my testing. Bose holds a close second, and I want to be fair about where it actually wins. The QC Ultra 2nd Gen has the more amply padded earcups and headband, so it fatigues more slowly on long-haul flights, and that extra cushioning also gives it a slight edge in passive isolation. There is also a smart new auto-sleep feature that drops the headphones into low-power mode the moment you take them off, no case required. If comfort over six hours is your priority, Bose is the call. The interesting context this week is the three-way with the AirPods Max 2, where reviewers tested all three and most still walked away with one of the Sony or Bose pairs. Down the list, Sennheiser's Momentum 4 remains my value-for-sound favorite with its 60-hour battery, and the Soundcore Space models stay the budget champions for anyone who wants strong ANC without the flagship price.

highlights.title: Sony XM6 leads on calls and portability
highlights.body: Returning stainless steel hinges fold it into a ball, and beamforming AI gives it the standout call quality in this group.

highlights.title: Bose wins long-session comfort
highlights.body: The QC Ultra 2nd Gen has more amply padded earcups and headband, so it fatigues more slowly on long flights and isolates slightly better passively.

highlights.title: Bose adds caseless auto-sleep
highlights.body: A new auto-sleep feature drops the headphones into low-power mode the moment you remove them, no case needed.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 is the sound-value pick
highlights.body: A 60-hour battery and rich tuning keep it my favorite for listeners who prioritize audio quality per dollar.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space holds the budget crown
highlights.body: Strong ANC and very long battery at a fraction of the flagship price keep the Space models the value champions.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 這週還是穩坐我的第一，最近跟 Bose QuietComfort Ultra 二代的對打，更讓我確定這個排序。Sony 把折疊轉軸找回來了，用不鏽鋼機構，XM6 可以收成一顆球好攜帶，而通話品質是它最亮的一點，靠波束成形 AI 跟精準收音，講電話時背景雜音壓得很乾淨。售價 449 美金確實站在價格頂端，但音質、降噪、軟體整套加起來，它在我手上還是領先。Bose 緊咬第二，我也要公道講它強在哪。QC Ultra 二代的耳罩跟頭帶填充更厚，長程飛機戴久比較不會悶痛，這層額外的軟墊也讓它在被動隔音上小贏一點。它還多了一個聰明的自動休眠，一摘下來就進低功耗，不用收進盒子。你最在意的是連續戴六小時的舒適度，那就選 Bose。這週有趣的背景是它跟 AirPods Max 2 的三方混戰，評測同時測了三支，多數人最後還是帶走 Sony 或 Bose 其中一支。榜單往下，Sennheiser Momentum 4 靠 60 小時續航，還是我心中音質 CP 值首選，Soundcore Space 系列則穩坐預算之王，想要強降噪又不想花旗艦價的人選它準沒錯。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 通話與攜帶最強
highlights.body: 不鏽鋼折疊轉軸回歸可收成一顆球，波束成形 AI 讓它在這組裡通話品質最突出。

highlights.title: Bose 長時間配戴最舒服
highlights.body: QC Ultra 二代耳罩與頭帶填充更厚，長程飛機戴久比較不悶，被動隔音也小贏一截。

highlights.title: Bose 新增免盒自動休眠
highlights.body: 新的自動休眠功能一摘下就進低功耗模式，不必放回收納盒。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 是音質 CP 值首選
highlights.body: 60 小時續航加上飽滿調音，是我推給重視每塊錢音質的人的選擇。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 穩坐預算王
highlights.body: 強降噪加超長續航，價格只要旗艦的一部分，Space 系列依然是 CP 值冠軍。

references.title: I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months — and there's a clear winner
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones (2nd Gen): which flagship wireless over-ears are best?
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones: Battle of the ANC heavyweights

en.commentary:
The Sony WH-1000XM6 holds rank 1, and the latest round of long-term testing confirms why it remains the class leader. In controlled measurements Sony reduces average ambient loudness by 87%, just ahead of the Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 at 85%, and that 9.6 noise-cancellation score plays out exactly as you would hope on a plane or a noisy train. What pushes Sony over the top for me is the combination of that ANC with a 9.5 sound-quality score and a 10-band EQ that gives you real control over tuning. Sony's signature here is warmer and weightier than Bose, and after six months of testing reviewers still land on the XM6 as the overall winner at this price.

The Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 at rank 2 is the comfort and isolation champion. Its more amply padded earcups and headband fatigue more slowly than Sony's somewhat thin padding, so for long-haul flights or full workdays it is the more wearable option. The second-gen model adds an auto-sleep mode that drops into low power when you take it off, no case required. Some testers genuinely rate its ANC as the best, full stop, calling it the set that blocks out everything. If comfort over many hours is your priority, this is the one.

The Sennheiser Momentum 4 at rank 3 stays the audiophile's value pick, pairing a 9.3 sound-quality score with a class-leading 9.5 battery-life rating. For listeners who care most about tonal accuracy and want their headphones to last days between charges, it remains a standout. The top three here are genuinely close, and the right call comes down to whether you weight raw ANC, all-day comfort, or sound character most.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 Stays the Class Leader
highlights.body: Sony reduces average ambient loudness by 87% in measurements, edging the Bose QC Ultra 2 at 85%. Combined with a 9.5 sound-quality score and a 10-band EQ, the XM6 remains the reviewers' overall winner after six months of testing.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 Wins on Comfort
highlights.body: More amply padded earcups and headband make the QC Ultra 2 the more wearable choice for long flights and full workdays. A new auto-sleep mode drops it into low power when removed, no case required.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Is the Audiophile Value Pick
highlights.body: A 9.3 sound-quality score paired with a class-leading 9.5 battery-life rating makes the Momentum 4 the standout for listeners who prioritize tonal accuracy and want days of playback between charges.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WH-1000XM6 穩坐第一，最新一輪長期實測再次說明它為什麼還是同級之王。在受控量測裡，Sony 把環境平均音量降低 87%，些微領先 Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 的 85%，而這個 9.6 分的降噪表現，在飛機上或吵雜的火車上完全如你所願。讓 Sony 在我心中勝出的，是降噪加上 9.5 分的音質，再配上 10 段 EQ，調音的自由度很高。Sony 的調性比 Bose 更溫暖、更有重量感，評測者用了六個月後，這個價位還是把 XM6 評為總體冠軍。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 排第二，是舒適度和隔音的冠軍。它的耳罩和頭帶填充更飽滿，比 Sony 偏薄的填充更不容易戴累，長途飛行或整天上班，它是更耐戴的選擇。二代還加了自動休眠模式，拿下來就進低耗電，不用收進盒子。有些評測者真心認為它的降噪是最強的，說它能把所有聲音擋掉。長時間配戴的舒適是你的首要考量的話，選它。

Sennheiser Momentum 4 排第三，仍然是發燒友的性價比選擇，9.3 分音質搭配同級最高的 9.5 分電池續航。最在意音色準確、又希望耳機充一次能撐好幾天的人，它依然出色。前三名其實咬得很緊，怎麼選就看你最重視純降噪、全天舒適、還是聲音個性。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 穩坐同級之王
highlights.body: 量測中 Sony 把環境平均音量降低 87%，些微領先 Bose QC Ultra 2 的 85%。加上 9.5 分音質和 10 段 EQ，評測者用六個月後仍把 XM6 評為總體冠軍。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 舒適度取勝
highlights.body: 更飽滿的耳罩和頭帶填充讓 QC Ultra 2 更耐戴，長途飛行和整天上班都更舒服。新增自動休眠模式，拿下來就進低耗電，不用收盒子。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 發燒性價比之選
highlights.body: 9.3 分音質搭配同級最高 9.5 分電池續航，Momentum 4 是最在意音色準確、又希望充一次撐好幾天的人的出色選擇。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
Best noise-cancelling headphones 2026 - tested by our in-house review experts
11 Best Noise-Canceling Headphones of 2026: Top Tested, Reviewed Picks

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays at number one, and RTINGS continues to call it the best noise cancelling headphone you can buy as a true all rounder. That is exactly how I see it. The ANC is class leading, the tuning is balanced enough to please most listeners out of the box, and the comfort holds up over long flights. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra keeps second because its noise cancelling is still the most complete I have heard across the frequency range, and reviewers this week again flagged that Bose reduces low rumble more capably than rivals. If pure silence is your priority, that is the pair to get. The Sennheiser Momentum 4 holds third on the strength of its long battery life and warm, easy listening sound, with the Sennheiser HDB 630 right behind as the audiophile leaning option for people who care more about detail than active cancelling. The Apple AirPods Max remains the strongest pick inside the Apple ecosystem, with ambient mode that several outlets still rate among the most natural. Lower down, the Soundcore Space pair continues to be the value story, delivering most of the experience for a fraction of the flagship price. Nothing this week changes the order. Sony leads on balance, Bose leads on raw cancelling, and the rest of the field sorts cleanly by priority.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 is the all rounder to beat
highlights.body: RTINGS names it the best noise cancelling headphone overall, and the reasoning matches mine. Top tier ANC, balanced tuning that needs no EQ fiddling, and comfort that survives long haul flights. That combination keeps it at rank 1.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra wins on raw silence
highlights.body: Reviewers this week again confirmed Bose reduces sound across the frequency range more capably than any rival, especially low rumble. If your single priority is the quietest possible cabin, this is the pair to buy.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space is the value play
highlights.body: The Space 2 and Space Q45 deliver the bulk of the flagship experience, solid ANC and pleasant sound, at a fraction of the price. They are the easy recommendation for anyone who wants strong cancelling without paying flagship money.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 還是第一，RTINGS 這週繼續把它列為最會的全能選手，老實說我也是這樣看的。降噪頂級、出廠調音夠平衡讓大多數人直接用就滿意、長途飛行戴起來也撐得住。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守住第二，因為它的降噪在整個頻段範圍內還是我聽過最完整的，這週評測又再次點出 Bose 壓低頻隆隆聲比對手更行。如果你只在乎安靜，就買這支。Sennheiser Momentum 4 靠長續航跟溫暖耐聽的聲音守住第三，Sennheiser HDB 630 緊跟在後，是給那種重視細節勝過主動降噪的發燒友選的。Apple AirPods Max 仍然是 Apple 生態裡最強的選擇，環境音模式好幾家媒體還是評為最自然的之一。再往下，Soundcore Space 那兩支繼續講 CP 值的故事，花零頭的價錢就能拿到大部分的體驗。這週沒有任何消息改動排序，Sony 贏在平衡，Bose 贏在純降噪實力，剩下的就照需求乾淨地排好。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 是要被超越的全能王
highlights.body: RTINGS 把它列為整體最佳降噪耳機，理由跟我的看法一致。頂級降噪、不用調 EQ 就平衡的調音、撐得過長程飛行的舒適度。這個組合讓它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 贏在純粹的安靜
highlights.body: 這週評測再次確認 Bose 在整個頻段壓制聲音比任何對手都行，低頻隆隆聲尤其明顯。如果你唯一的需求就是機艙裡最安靜的那支，買它就對了。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 是 CP 值首選
highlights.body: Space 2 跟 Space Q45 用零頭的價錢給你旗艦大部分的體驗，紮實降噪加上好聽的聲音。想要強降噪又不想花旗艦的錢，這就是最好推的選擇。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2, tested for 6 months

en.commentary: In June 2026 the Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one over-ear because it wins on the widest set of axes. RTINGS still rates it the best noise-cancelling headphone tested, and after a six-month head-to-head against the Bose, the Sony comes out ahead thanks to a 10-band EQ versus Bose's three bands, more noise-cancelling modes, and 30 hours of battery to Bose's 24. The QN3 processor and 12-mic array do the heavy lifting on isolation, and the sound is supremely customizable. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones hold a clear second and they deserve it, the cancellation is still best-in-class for sheer quiet, the new spatial audio mode is genuinely fun, and the fit stays the most comfortable in the category. Sennheiser's Momentum 4 keeps third for the warmest tuning and marathon battery, with the new HDB 630 right behind. Apple's AirPods Max remain the pick for deep iPhone integration despite their age. The recurring note in this week's coverage is that value models have closed the gap, the JBL Live 780NC delivers a lot of the experience for far less. Nothing launched in the past seven days that reorders the top, so I am carrying it forward. Buy the XM6 for the best all-rounder, the Bose for comfort and pure quiet, and the Momentum 4 if you want warmth and the longest battery.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 stays No. 1
highlights.body: A 10-band EQ, more ANC modes, and 30 hours of battery win the six-month head-to-head against Bose.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年 6 月，Sony WH-1000XM6 還是我心中第一的罩耳式耳機，因為它在最多面向上都贏。RTINGS 仍把它評為測過降噪最強的耳機，而且經過六個月跟 Bose 的對決，Sony 勝出，靠的是 10 段 EQ（Bose 只有 3 段）、更多降噪模式，還有 30 小時續航對上 Bose 的 24 小時。QN3 處理器加 12 麥克風陣列扛起隔音重任，音色又能高度自訂。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 穩坐第二，這名次它當之無愧，論純粹的安靜，它的降噪仍是同級頂尖，新的空間音效模式也真的好玩，配戴感更是這個級距最舒服的。Sennheiser Momentum 4 守第三，音色最暖、續航超長，新的 HDB 630 緊追在後。蘋果 AirPods Max 雖然推出有些時間了，仍是 iPhone 深度整合的首選。這週報導一直提到一件事，平價款已經把差距追上來了，JBL Live 780NC 用低很多的價格給你大部分的體驗。過去七天沒有東西重排前段，所以照搬。要最全面就買 XM6，要舒適跟純粹安靜就選 Bose，想要暖聲跟最長續航就選 Momentum 4。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra for 6 months — and there's a clear winner

en.commentary: Going into June 2026 the Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps my top spot, and a six-month head-to-head against the Bose this month confirms why. RTINGS still rates the XM6 the best noise-cancelling headphone tested, measuring roughly 87 percent average loudness reduction against the Bose's 85 percent, a real if narrow edge. What seals it for me is everything around the ANC: a superior 10-band EQ versus Bose's three, a warmer and weightier tuning that still pulls fine detail, and the most complete app in the category. Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds a very close second and genuinely wins on comfort, with plusher earcup padding and a roomier headband that fatigues far slower on long flights. If your priority is wearing them for eight hours straight, the Bose is the smarter buy, and I keep that verdict honest. Sennheiser Momentum 4 stays third as the audiophile's value champion, pairing the warmest sound here with a monster 60-hour battery. The Sennheiser HDB 630 sits fourth on sheer sonic refinement, then AirPods Max 2 fifth for the iPhone crowd. Soundcore's Space 2 and Q45 remain the budget heroes that punch absurdly above their price. Nothing this week moved the order, so I carried the board forward. My steer: Sony for the all-round best, Bose if comfort is everything, Sennheiser if you want warmth and battery for less.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 is the all-round best
highlights.body: RTINGS still rates it the top ANC headphone, measuring about 87 percent loudness reduction to Bose's 85, plus a 10-band EQ and the deepest app. That blend of leading cancellation and customization keeps it at number one.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra wins comfort outright
highlights.body: Plusher padding and a roomier headband fatigue far slower on long flights, the clear comfort victor in a six-month test. If you wear headphones for hours at a stretch, this is the smarter buy and a deserved close second.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 is the value champ
highlights.body: It pairs the warmest, most musical tuning in the group with a 60-hour battery that outlasts everything here. For audiophiles who want premium sound without the flagship price, it stays a confident third.

highlights.title: Soundcore still owns the budget tier
highlights.body: The Space 2 and Q45 deliver strong ANC and 50-plus-hour battery for a fraction of flagship money. They remain the pair I recommend to anyone who refuses to spend big yet still wants real quiet.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年 6 月，Sony WH-1000XM6 守住我的榜首，這個月跟 Bose 的半年實測對決正好說明原因。RTINGS 還是把 XM6 評為測過最佳的降噪耳機，量到的平均音量衰減大約 87 趴，對上 Bose 的 85 趴，差距雖小但是真的領先。對我來說真正關鍵的是降噪以外的東西，10 段 EQ 對上 Bose 的 3 段、調音更暖更有重量卻還能抓出細節、App 也是全類別最完整。話說回來，Bose QuietComfort Ultra 緊咬第二，而且配戴是真的贏，耳罩填充更厚、頭帶更寬，長途飛行戴久了疲勞慢很多。如果你的重點就是要一次戴八小時，Bose 是更聰明的選擇，這個判斷我說白。Sennheiser Momentum 4 守第三，是發燒友的性價比冠軍，這群裡最暖的聲音配上誇張的 60 小時續航。Sennheiser HDB 630 排第四，純看聲音的細膩度，再來 AirPods Max 2 第五給 iPhone 族。Soundcore 的 Space 2 跟 Q45 還是那種價格低到誇張卻很能打的平價英雄。這週沒事件動排名，所以我把整個榜延續下來。建議是，要全能最佳選 Sony、配戴至上選 Bose、想要暖聲又長續航又省錢就選 Sennheiser。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 是全能最佳
highlights.body: RTINGS 還是把它評為降噪耳機之首，量到約 87 趴音量衰減對上 Bose 的 85，再加 10 段 EQ 跟最深的 App。這份領先降噪加可調性的組合，讓它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 配戴完勝
highlights.body: 填充更厚、頭帶更寬，長途飛行戴久疲勞慢很多，半年實測裡配戴明確勝出。會一次戴好幾小時的人，這副是更聰明的選擇，緊咬第二實至名歸。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 是性價比王
highlights.body: 這群裡最暖最有音樂性的調音，配上 60 小時、把全場都熬贏的續航。想要旗艦級聲音又不想付旗艦價的發燒友，它穩穩守第三。

highlights.title: Soundcore 仍主宰平價層
highlights.body: Space 2 跟 Q45 用旗艦零頭的價格給你不錯的降噪跟 50 小時以上續航。死不肯花大錢、卻又想要真安靜的人，我就推這兩副。

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays at number one because it remains the most complete over-ear you can buy. The noise cancellation is class-leading again, the foldable design returned by popular demand, the app gives you control nobody else matches, and the sound is tuned so well out of the box that most people never touch the EQ. For the broadest set of buyers this is simply the right pair. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second and still wins one specific contest, raw quiet, the noise cancellation is the most physically convincing in the category and the comfort over long flights is unbeaten. If silence is your single priority, buy Bose. The Sennheiser Momentum 4 stays third as the audiophile's value pick, the most natural sound of the mainstream three and battery that runs longer than either rival. Sennheiser HDB 630 holds fourth as the wired-quality option. The Apple AirPods Max round out the visible top for the iPhone ecosystem. Nothing this week moved the order. The split stays simple: Sony for all-round, Bose for silence, Sennheiser for sound.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 is the most complete over-ear

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 我還是放第一，因為它依然是你買得到最完整的耳罩式。降噪再次同級最強，可折疊設計應觀眾要求回歸，App 給你的控制沒人比得上，音質出廠調得好到多數人從不動 EQ。對最廣的買家來說，這就是對的那副。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第二，依然贏一場特定比賽，純粹的安靜，它的降噪是這類別裡physically最有說服力的，長途飛行的舒適也無人能敵。安靜是你唯一優先就買 Bose。Sennheiser Momentum 4 守第三，是發燒友的性價比選擇，主流三強裡音色最自然，電池也比兩個對手都長。Sennheiser HDB 630 守第四，是有線級音質選擇。Apple AirPods Max 收尾可見前段，給 iPhone 生態。這週沒事件改變順序。分法很簡單：全面選 Sony、安靜選 Bose、音質選 Sennheiser。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
Best noise-cancelling headphones 2026 - tested by our in-house review experts

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays at number one because it wins the measurement that matters most in this category. RTINGS' latest 2026 roundup still ranks it as the best noise cancelling headphone tested, and the QN3 chip behind that result reacts to incoming noise fast enough to flatten the low-frequency rumble of a plane cabin before you notice it. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second on the strength of comfort and raw cancellation, and What Hi-Fi continues to call it the standout for pure ANC performance. If your priority is a headphone you forget you are wearing on a six-hour flight, this is the one. Sennheiser owns the middle of the podium twice over. The Momentum 4 keeps third with a 60-hour battery that is the longest in the field, so a week of commuting fits between charges. The HDB 630 sits fourth as the audiophile pick, delivering the most natural soundstage here through 42mm transducers and a parametric EQ. The AirPods Max 2 takes fifth and is the obvious call for iPhone owners who want lossless audio over USB-C and ANC that trades blows with the XM6. Value buyers are well served further down. The Soundcore Space 2 at sixth pairs a 50-hour ANC battery and LDAC for a fraction of the flagship money, and the Space Q45 right behind it does the same job for even less. Across the board the rankings hold this week. No new flagship launched and no price moved enough to reshuffle the order, so the verdict from last week stands: buy on the feature that matters to you, because every headphone in this top six is excellent at what it sets out to do.

highlights.title: The Sony WH-1000XM6 is still the cancellation benchmark
highlights.body: RTINGS' 2026 testing again places it first for noise isolation. The QN3 chip's seven-times-faster processing flattens airplane and subway rumble before it reaches your ear, which is the single hardest thing for ANC to do well.

highlights.title: The Bose QuietComfort Ultra is the comfort-first flagship
highlights.body: What Hi-Fi calls it the standout for pure ANC, and its lightweight frame with deep padding makes it the headphone you forget on a long flight. ActiveSense adapts to sudden gate-area and construction noise in real time.

highlights.title: The Sennheiser Momentum 4 wins the battery argument
highlights.body: Its 60-hour ANC runtime is the longest on this list, so a full week of round-trip commuting fits between charges. Pair that with adaptive ANC and audiophile tuning at a mid-range price and it earns its podium spot.

highlights.title: The AirPods Max 2 is the clear Apple-ecosystem pick
highlights.body: The H2 chip delivers 1.5x better ANC than the original plus Conversation Awareness, Voice Isolation, and lossless audio over USB-C. For iPhone owners the seamless handoff and Find My integration seal it.

highlights.title: The Soundcore Space 2 is the value champion of the list
highlights.body: A 50-hour ANC battery, LDAC high-res Bluetooth, and four-stage adaptive ANC at well under a third of flagship pricing. It is the easy recommendation for anyone who refuses to spend flagship money.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 這週繼續坐穩第一，原因很單純，它在這個品類最重要的那項量測上贏了。RTINGS 2026 年最新評測還是把它列為實測降噪最強的耳機，背後的 QN3 晶片反應速度快到飛機客艙的低頻轟鳴你還沒察覺就被壓平了。坦白說這就是旗艦該有的樣子。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守住第二，靠的是舒適度加上純降噪實力，What Hi-Fi 也持續把它選為純 ANC 表現的標竿。如果你要的是六小時長程班機戴著會忘記它存在的那種耳機，這台就對了。Sennheiser 一口氣包辦中段兩個名次。Momentum 4 守第三，60 小時電池是全場最長，一週通勤下來充電次數真的屈指可數。HDB 630 排第四，是發燒友首選，42 公釐單體加參數等化器做出這份榜單最自然的聲音空間感。AirPods Max 2 拿第五，iPhone 用戶想要 USB-C 無損加上跟 XM6 互有勝負的降噪，這台是直覺解。預算族往下看也有好貨。第六的 Soundcore Space 2 把 50 小時 ANC 電池和 LDAC 用台幣四千出頭就給你，後面緊跟的 Space Q45 做一樣的事還更便宜。整體來說這週排名沒動，沒有新旗艦發表，也沒有哪台價格跳動到能洗牌的程度，所以上週的結論照舊，挑你最在意的那項規格下手就好，前六名每一台都把該做的事做得很好。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 還是降噪標竿
highlights.body: RTINGS 2026 實測再次把它排第一。QN3 晶片快了七倍的處理速度，能在飛機和捷運的低頻轟鳴傳到你耳朵前就先壓平，這是 ANC 最難做好的一件事。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 是舒適優先的旗艦
highlights.body: What Hi-Fi 把它選為純 ANC 標竿，輕量機身配上厚實耳墊，是長程班機戴著會忘記的那種耳機。ActiveSense 動態降噪對登機口、施工現場這類突發噪音即時調節，反應又快又準。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 在電池這局贏定了
highlights.body: 60 小時 ANC 續航是這份榜單最長，一週來回通勤充電次數屈指可數。加上自適應 ANC 和發燒級調音又落在中價位，這個podium位置實至名歸。

highlights.title: AirPods Max 2 是 Apple 生態系的直覺選擇
highlights.body: H2 晶片降噪比初代強 1.5 倍，還有 Conversation Awareness、Voice Isolation 和 USB-C 無損音訊。iPhone 用戶看中的就是那個無縫切換和 Find My 整合，買它沒懸念。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 是全場性價比王
highlights.body: 50 小時 ANC 電池、LDAC 高解析藍牙、四段自適應 ANC，價格不到旗艦的三分之一。不想花旗艦錢的人，這台就是最好推的那個。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs. Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 Headphones: Review

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps the top spot and the latest testing keeps agreeing. Reviewers still call it the best combination of noise cancellation, sound, and features for most people, and the HD Noise Canceling Processor QN3 with twelve microphones does the heavy lifting that makes a flight or open office disappear. I keep recommending it as the default for anyone who travels or commutes. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second on comfort and cancellation, and it is the pair I suggest for all-day wear because the cushions seal well and the headband never gets heavy. Sennheiser sits third with the Momentum 4, which I love for tonal balance and a battery that genuinely outlasts the competition. I noted that Bose now has a second-generation QuietComfort Ultra in the market, but without enough independent testing to justify shaking up the order, I am staying conservative. This week was reviews rather than a launch I would act on, so the rankings and scores carry forward unchanged.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 stays the default

highlights.body: The cushions seal well and the headband never feels heavy, so it stays comfortable for hours. When comfort is the priority, this is my pick.

highlights.body: Its tonal balance and class-leading battery keep it at third. For long days away from a charger, it is the one I trust.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Sony WH-1000XM6 還是穩坐第一，最新測試也持續認同。評測仍說它在降噪、音質、功能的綜合表現是大多數人最好的選擇，HD 降噪處理器 QN3 搭配十二支麥克風，能把飛機艙跟開放式辦公室的吵雜整個抹掉。常出差、常通勤的人，我都直接推它當預設選擇。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第二，靠的是舒適度跟降噪，要整天戴的人我會推這副，耳墊密封做得好，頭帶久戴也不會壓。Sennheiser 排第三，是 Momentum 4，我很喜歡它的音色平衡，續航也真的比同級耐用。我有注意到 Bose 市面上已經有第二代 QuietComfort Ultra，但目前獨立測試還不夠多，不足以撼動排序，所以我選擇保守。這週是評測而非值得我出手調整的新品，因此排名跟分數都原樣帶過。

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one, and another week of head-to-head reviews keeps it there. RTINGS still has it as the best noise cancelling headphones tested, and the reason is that it edges out everything at both ends of the frequency spectrum for cancellation while keeping sound that genuinely satisfies. The margin over Bose is small, reviewers keep calling it marginal and not obviously audible, but it is consistent, and the XM6 backs it with a comfortable fold-flat design and reliable battery. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second and is the one I steer comfort-first buyers toward. Its earcups and headband are more amply padded and fatigue more slowly on long flights, and the second-gen auto-sleep mode that powers down when you take them off without needing the case is a genuinely nice touch. The honest split between them is app experience, Sony's Sound Connect app is cluttered while Bose's is bare but easy. The Sennheiser Momentum 4 stays third on the strength of class-leading battery life and a warm, detailed sound that audio fans love. For budget buyers the Soundcore Space 2 remains my value standout. My quick read for June: XM6 for the best all-round ANC, Bose Ultra for comfort on long trips, and Momentum 4 for endurance and sound.

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one, and another week of head to head reviews keeps it there. RTINGS still ranks it the best noise cancelling headphones it has tested, with remarkable isolation across the spectrum and sound that genuinely satisfies, 30 hours of battery and a price that regularly drops below 400 dollars. That blend of performance and reach is why it remains my default for most people. The honest wrinkle this week, and it is one I want to be straight about, is that on pure noise suppression the Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2nd Gen consistently edges the Sony in side by side tests, especially on airplane engine rumble and low frequency drone. If raw cancellation is your single top priority, Bose is the one to beat. I still keep Sony first because its advantage in sound quality, cross platform features and battery is broader and more consistent, while Bose's edge is narrow and most noticeable in specific low end scenarios. So the gap is real but the overall package still tilts to Sony. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second and is the pair I steer comfort first buyers toward, its earcups and headband are more amply padded and fatigue more slowly on long flights, and the second gen auto sleep that powers down when you take them off without needing the case is a genuinely nice touch. The Sennheiser Momentum 4 stays third on class leading battery life and a warm, detailed sound audio fans love. For budget buyers the Soundcore Space 2 remains my value standout. My quick read for June, XM6 for the best all round ANC, Bose Ultra for comfort and the strongest low frequency suppression, Momentum 4 for endurance and sound.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 守住我的第一，又一週的對打評測讓它繼續坐穩。RTINGS 還是把它列為測過最強的降噪耳機，全頻段隔音都很猛，聲音也真的好聽，30 小時續航，價格還常常掉到 400 美金以下。這種效能加普及度的組合，就是我把它當大多數人預設選擇的原因。這週有個我想講清楚的誠實轉折，純看降噪壓制力，Bose QuietComfort Ultra 二代在並排測試裡一直小贏 Sony，尤其在飛機引擎那種低頻轟鳴上特別明顯。如果純降噪是你唯一最在意的點，Bose 就是要打敗的那台。我還是把 Sony 放第一，因為它在音質、跨平台功能跟續航上的優勢更全面也更一致，而 Bose 的領先很窄，主要在特定低頻情境才聽得出來。所以差距是真的，但整體包裝還是偏向 Sony。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第二，是我推給舒適優先買家的那副，耳罩跟頭帶填充更厚，長途飛行更慢累，二代的自動休眠拿下來就斷電、不用收進盒子，這設計真的貼心。Sennheiser Momentum 4 守第三，靠同級最強續航跟溫暖有細節、發燒友很愛的聲音。預算派的話 Soundcore Space 2 還是我的 CP 值標竿。六月結論，全方位降噪選 XM6，舒適跟最強低頻壓制選 Bose Ultra，續航跟聲音選 Momentum 4。

en.commentary: I keep coming back to the same conclusion after weeks of switching between these: the Sony WH-1000XM6 is the headphone I recommend first, and the gap between it and the field is real. The lighter, more compact frame fixed my biggest complaint about the XM5, and the cancellation handles the low rumble of a train or a plane with the kind of authority that lets me forget I have anything on my head. Sony earns its top spot because it does everything well at once, and that balance is rare. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra stays right behind it, and if your single priority is the quietest possible commute, this is the one I hand people. Bose still owns the most convincing silence, and the cushions are the comfiest I have worn for an all-day flight. Sennheiser remains the choice for anyone who listens first and cancels second. The Momentum 4 gives me the longest battery in the group, easily a full work week between charges, and the tuning rewards careful listening. The newer HDB 630 sits just below it as the audiophile pick, with a richer, more detailed presentation that I appreciate on acoustic recordings. The AirPods Max still makes sense inside an iPhone household for the instant pairing and spatial audio, though the weight reminds me it is the heaviest here. Down the value end, the Soundcore Space 2 keeps surprising me. For roughly a third of the flagship price it delivers ANC and battery that punch far above the cost, and it is the easy pick for a student or a first set. My advice this week stays simple: buy the XM6 for the best all-round experience, the Bose for pure quiet, and a Sennheiser if sound is sacred.

highlights.body: The Momentum 4 lasts a full work week per charge and the HDB 630 adds a richer, more detailed presentation that shines on acoustic tracks.

highlights.body: At roughly a third of flagship money it offers ANC and battery that outclass the price, making it the obvious first set for a student.

en.commentary: The premium headphone field is quiet this week, and when it is this settled I am happy to let a strong order stand. The Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps my top spot because it does the two things that matter most at the highest level: its noise cancellation is the most thorough I have tested for blocking the low rumble of a plane cabin or a busy commute, and its tuning is rich and detailed without getting harsh on long listens. For one pair that travels, works, and relaxes, this is still my default. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second and remains the comfort king, with a plush fit I can wear through a full transatlantic flight and ANC that comes within a hair of Sony's. If you prize all day comfort above a touch of detail, this is your pair. The Sennheiser Momentum 4 stays third on the strength of class leading battery life and a warm, easy going sound that suits long days. For value, the Soundcore Space 2 keeps punching well above its price with genuinely capable ANC and battery that runs for days. I held every rank because no new launch shifted the picture this week. Buy the XM6 for the best all round package, the QC Ultra if comfort tops your list, and the Soundcore Space 2 if you want most of the experience for a fraction of the cost.

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one this week, and it earns it on the two things that matter most in this category. The noise cancellation is the most effective I have tested, yet it stays natural and subtle rather than that pressurized feeling some rivals give you on a long flight. Sony also brought back the folding hinge, so the XM6 collapses into a ball that actually fits a bag, a small thing you appreciate every time you travel. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second, and it remains the comfort champion: the plushest earcups in the lineup and easygoing tuning you can wear all day. It blocks sound marginally harder than the Sony, so if pure silence is your priority it is a fair swap. The Sennheiser Momentum 4 stays third on sound quality and a genuinely class-leading battery that just keeps going. This week's roundups reaffirmed the same top order, with the Sennheiser HDB 630 holding fourth as the audiophile pick. Down the value end, the Soundcore Space 2 keeps over-delivering for the money and earns its sixth spot. No new flagship landed, so I held all thirteen ranks steady. Buy Sony for the best all-round package, Bose for comfort and raw silence, Sennheiser for sound and stamina.

highlights.body: The most effective cancellation I have tested, yet it stays natural rather than pressurized on a long flight. The returning folding hinge makes it pack down properly too.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 over-delivers
highlights.body: Strong ANC and huge battery for a fraction of the flagship price, the easy value call and a comfortable sixth this week.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 這週繼續是我心中的第一名，它在這個類別最重要的兩件事上都站得住腳。降噪是我測過最有效的，而且維持自然細膩的感覺，搭長途飛機不會像某些對手那樣給你那種耳膜被壓住的悶感。Sony 這次還把折疊轉軸找回來了，XM6 可以收成一顆球塞進包包，這種小事每次出門你都會感激。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守住第二，它依然是舒適度冠軍，耳罩是榜上最柔軟的，調音輕鬆耐聽，戴一整天也沒問題。它擋音比 Sony 稍微再強一點點，你要的就是純粹的安靜，這個取捨很合理。Sennheiser Momentum 4 靠音質跟真正同級最強的續航守住第三，電量就是用不完。這週的榜單重申了同樣的前段排名，Sennheiser HDB 630 守住第四當發燒友首選。價格帶這端，Soundcore Space 2 持續超值，穩穩拿下第六。這週沒有新旗艦上市，所以十三個名次我全部不動。要最全能的整體包就買 Sony，要舒適跟純粹安靜就買 Bose，要音質跟續航就買 Sennheiser。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 自然降噪稱王
highlights.body: 我測過最有效的降噪，卻維持自然不悶，搭長途飛機耳膜不會被壓住。折疊轉軸回歸讓它收納也很方便。

highlights.title: Bose Ultra 是舒適冠軍
highlights.body: 榜上最柔軟的耳罩配輕鬆耐聽的調音，戴一整天沒問題。擋音比 Sony 再強一點，你最在意安靜的話這個取捨很值。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 續航猛
highlights.body: 同級最強的電量配上飽滿音質，電量用不完。守住第三，討厭充電的出差族首選。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 超值
highlights.body: 強降噪加大電量，價格只要旗艦的一小部分，輕鬆的 CP 值之選，這週穩穩拿下第六。

references.title: Best noise-cancelling headphones 2026 tested by our in-house review experts
The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
11 Best Noise-Canceling Headphones of 2026

en.commentary: Nothing shifted in the order this week, and that tells me the market has settled into a comfortable plateau. The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays at the top because it does everything well, the QN3 processor with 12 microphones still posts the best all-round cancellation I have measured, the new 30mm drivers sound balanced, and the return of a foldable hinge solved my one real gripe with the XM5. Reviewers keep calling it the headphone to beat, and I agree. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second on the strength of the quietest cabin I have experienced, if pure silence on a plane is your priority this is still the one. Sennheiser's Momentum 4 keeps third for that 60-hour battery and a warm, easy tuning that I never tire of on long sessions. I spent more time this week with the Sennheiser HDB 630, and it continues to impress with detailed sound that punches above its rank. Apple's AirPods Max remain the obvious choice inside an iPhone household, the handoff between devices is still the smoothest in this group. On value, the Soundcore Space 2 keeps doing the impossible, real ANC and 50-hour battery for a fraction of the flagship price. If you already own any of the top five, sit tight, there is no upgrade worth your money right now. Buy the one whose strength matches how you actually listen.

highlights.title: Sony XM6 is still the one to beat
highlights.body: Best all-round cancellation I have measured, balanced 30mm drivers, and the foldable hinge is back. It earns rank one again with no asterisks.

highlights.title: Bose Ultra owns the quiet
highlights.body: The quietest cabin in this group. For flyers who want pure silence above all else, this remains the headphone I reach for.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 for marathons
highlights.body: Sixty hours of battery and a warm tuning that stays comfortable across an entire workday. Third place is well earned.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 wins on value
highlights.body: Genuine ANC and 50-hour battery at a fraction of flagship cost. It keeps making the premium price gap hard to justify.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜順序完全沒動，而這件事本身就告訴我，市場已經進入一個很舒服的平原期。Sony WH-1000XM6 穩坐第一，因為它每一項都做得好，QN3 處理器配 12 顆麥克風依然是我量過綜合降噪最強的，新的 30mm 單體聲音很均衡，可折疊轉軸回歸也修掉了我對 XM5 唯一的抱怨。各家評測一直說它是要被打敗的那支，我同意。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守住第二，靠的是我體驗過最安靜的座艙，如果你在飛機上就是要那種純粹的安靜，它還是這支。Sennheiser Momentum 4 第三名，靠的是 60 小時續航跟那種溫暖好入耳的調音，長時間聽也不會膩。這禮拜我多花了點時間在 Sennheiser HDB 630 上，它細節豐富的聲音持續讓我驚艷，表現比排名還好。Apple AirPods Max 在 iPhone 生態圈裡還是那個最直覺的選擇，裝置間切換依舊是這群裡最順的。講到 CP 值，Soundcore Space 2 一直在做不可能的事，真正能用的降噪加 50 小時續航，價格只要旗艦的一小部分。如果你已經有前五名任何一支，安心放著，現在沒有值得你花錢的升級。挑那支強項對得上你聽音習慣的就對了。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 還是那支要被超越的
highlights.body: 我量過綜合降噪最強，30mm 單體聲音均衡，可折疊轉軸回歸。它這次理所當然再拿第一。

highlights.title: Bose Ultra 安靜稱王
highlights.body: 這群裡最安靜的座艙。對只要純粹安靜的飛行常客來說，這還是我會拿起來的那一支。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 適合長時間
highlights.body: 60 小時續航加溫暖調音，一整天工作下來耳朵也舒服。第三名拿得很實在。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 CP 值之王
highlights.body: 真正能用的降噪加 50 小時續航，價格只要旗艦的一小角。它持續讓旗艦的價差很難說服人。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs. Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 Headphones: Review
Best noise canceling headphones in 2026

en.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one, and RTINGS naming it the best noise cancelling headphones tested in 2026 backs the call. It wins on the combination of comfort and cancellation, the folding hinge is back so it actually packs down for travel, and the sound tuning is the most versatile in the category. For most people who want one pair that does everything well, this is still the easy answer. Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second and earns a small ANC bump this week. Reviewers note it cancels a hair more low-frequency rumble than the Sony, and the low clamping force lets you wear it through a transatlantic flight without temple pressure. If raw quiet and all-day comfort lead your list, Bose is the pick, and its scores reflect that. Sennheiser Momentum 4 keeps third on the strength of class-leading battery life and a warm, refined sound. The HDB 630 sits right behind it for listeners who want Sennheiser's tuning with a slightly more analytical edge. Apple AirPods Max remains the choice for anyone deep in the Apple ecosystem, where the seamless switching and spatial audio earn their keep despite the price. Soundcore Space 2 and Space Q45 anchor the value tier, both delivering strong ANC and huge battery life for a fraction of the flagship cost. The order is steady this week. The Sony-versus-Bose race tightened slightly, which is why I lifted Bose's cancellation a notch, but the top remains Sony's to lose.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 is the all-rounder
highlights.body: RTINGS calls it the best tested in 2026 for the comfort-plus-cancellation mix. The folding hinge returns for travel, and the tuning is the most versatile here. It is the easy pick for most listeners.

highlights.title: Bose cancels a hair more
highlights.body: Reviewers note slightly stronger low-frequency cancellation than the Sony, and the low clamping force suits long flights without temple pressure. That earns it a cancellation bump this week.

highlights.title: Momentum 4 for marathon battery
highlights.body: Sennheiser still leads on battery life with a warm, refined sound. For long-haul travelers who hate charging, this is the pair that keeps going.

highlights.title: Soundcore anchors the value tier
highlights.body: Space 2 and Space Q45 deliver strong ANC and huge battery life at a fraction of flagship pricing. They are where I send budget-focused buyers first.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 這週繼續第一，RTINGS 把它列為 2026 年實測最佳降噪耳機，正好幫這個排名背書。它贏在舒適度跟降噪的綜合表現，折疊鉸鏈回歸了，出門真的收得起來，音色調校也是這個級距裡最全能的。大多數人想要一副什麼都做得好的耳機，這還是最省事的答案。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守住第二，這週降噪小加分。評測指出它對低頻轟鳴的壓制比 Sony 多那麼一點點，加上夾力很輕，戴著飛一趟跨大西洋航班，太陽穴也不會被壓得難受。把純粹的安靜跟整天舒適擺第一的人，就選 Bose，分數也反映了這點。Sennheiser Momentum 4 維持第三，靠的是同級最頂的續航跟溫暖細膩的聲音。HDB 630 緊跟在後，給想要 Sennheiser 調音又偏好多一點分析味的人。Apple AirPods Max 還是 Apple 生態系深度用戶的首選，無縫切換跟空間音訊就算貴也撐得起價格。Soundcore Space 2 跟 Space Q45 撐起高 CP 值區塊，兩款都用旗艦的零頭價格給你扎實降噪跟超長續航。這週排名穩定，Sony 對 Bose 的差距稍微拉近，所以我把 Bose 的降噪往上挪一格，不過第一還是 Sony 的，要看誰能把它擠下來。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 是全能王
highlights.body: RTINGS 把它列為 2026 實測最佳，靠的就是舒適加降噪的綜合。折疊鉸鏈回歸方便攜帶，調音也最全能。對多數人就是最省事的選擇。

highlights.title: Bose 降噪多壓一點
highlights.body: 評測指出它對低頻的壓制比 Sony 多一點，夾力又輕，適合長途飛行不壓太陽穴。這週降噪因此加分。

highlights.title: Momentum 4 續航馬拉松
highlights.body: Sennheiser 續航還是領先，聲音溫暖細膩。長途旅行又懶得充電的人，這副撐得最久。

highlights.title: Soundcore 撐起高 CP 區
highlights.body: Space 2 跟 Space Q45 用旗艦零頭價給你扎實降噪跟超長續航。預算掛帥的買家，我第一個推這兩款。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones (2nd Gen)

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one, and the latest long-term testing backs that call. RTINGS still names it the best noise cancelling headphone it has tested, and What Hi-Fi gives it best-in-class honors for 2026. What seals it for me is the combination of class-leading ANC that swallows jet engines and office chatter alike, plus the smartest feature set of any pair: geolocation-based sound profiles, a full 10-band EQ and genuinely useful offline voice controls. Add roughly 25% more battery life than the Bose and it is the most complete all-rounder you can buy. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second and remains the comfort champion. Reviewers this week again gave Bose the edge on passive isolation thanks to plusher earpads and a better padded headband that fatigue more slowly on long flights, so if you wear headphones all day for travel, Bose is the more comfortable choice. The Sennheiser Momentum 4 keeps third as the best pick for pure listening pleasure paired with marathon battery life, while the new Sennheiser HDB 630 sits fourth with the most detailed, audiophile-leaning sound on the list. The AirPods Max remain the obvious choice for anyone deep in the Apple ecosystem. Down the value end, the Soundcore Space 2 and Space Q45 keep punching far above their price with strong ANC and huge battery numbers. Rankings held steady this week because the comparisons reinforced the existing order rather than shaking it up. Sony for the complete package, Bose for comfort, Sennheiser for sound. That is the shape of the market right now.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 is the complete package
highlights.body: RTINGS and What Hi-Fi both crown it best in 2026. Class-leading ANC, geolocation sound profiles, a 10-band EQ and 25% more battery than Bose make it the all-rounder to beat.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra wins comfort
highlights.body: Reviewers again gave Bose the edge on passive isolation, with plusher earpads and headband that fatigue slower on long flights. The pick if you wear headphones all day.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 for sound and stamina
highlights.body: It pairs rich, musical tuning with the longest battery life on the list. My third pick for anyone who prioritizes listening pleasure over the smartest feature set.

highlights.title: Sennheiser HDB 630 leans audiophile
highlights.body: The newest Sennheiser delivers the most detailed, refined sound here at number four. Worth a listen if nuance and resolution top your list.

highlights.title: Soundcore owns the value tier
highlights.body: The Space 2 and Space Q45 deliver strong ANC and huge battery numbers for a fraction of flagship money. Smart picks if budget drives the decision.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 還是穩坐我的第一名，最近的長期實測也支持這個判斷。RTINGS 到現在還是把它列為測過最強的降噪耳機，What Hi-Fi 也給它 2026 年同級最佳的榮譽。讓我拍板的是它把同級最強的降噪，跟同類裡最聰明的功能組合在一起，飛機引擎跟辦公室的講話聲都吃得下，還有依地點切換的聲音設定、完整的 10 段 EQ，加上真的好用的離線語音控制。再加上電池續航比 Bose 多大約 25%，它就是你能買到最全能的一副。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第二，還是舒適度冠軍。這週評測又再次給 Bose 在被動隔音上加分，因為耳罩更厚、頭帶包覆更好，搭長途飛機戴久比較不會累，所以如果你整天戴著耳機到處跑，Bose 戴起來比較舒服。Sennheiser Momentum 4 守第三，是純聽音樂享受加上超長續航的最佳選擇，新的 Sennheiser HDB 630 排第四，聲音是榜單裡最細膩、最偏發燒友取向的。AirPods Max 還是 Apple 生態系使用者的明顯首選。在高 CP 那端，Soundcore Space 2 跟 Space Q45 繼續用很強的降噪跟超大電量打出遠超售價的表現。這週名次維持不動，因為比較結果是強化既有順序，而不是翻盤。要全能選 Sony，要舒適選 Bose，要聲音選 Sennheiser，這就是現在市場的樣貌。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 是全能王
highlights.body: RTINGS 跟 What Hi-Fi 都把它選為 2026 最佳。同級最強降噪、依地點切換的聲音設定、10 段 EQ，加上比 Bose 多 25% 的電量，它就是其他人要追的全能機。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 舒適度取勝
highlights.body: 評測又再次給 Bose 被動隔音加分，耳罩更厚、頭帶包覆更好，搭長途飛機戴久比較不累。整天戴耳機的人就選它。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 聲音續航兼具
highlights.body: 它把豐潤好聽的調音跟榜單裡最長的續航結合在一起。如果你看重聽音樂的享受勝過最聰明的功能，這是我的第三名選擇。

highlights.title: Sennheiser HDB 630 偏發燒取向
highlights.body: 最新的 Sennheiser 在第四名帶來這裡最細膩、最精緻的聲音。如果你最看重細節跟解析力，值得試聽。

highlights.title: Soundcore 稱霸高 CP 端
highlights.body: Space 2 跟 Space Q45 用很強的降噪跟超大電量打出遠低於旗艦價的表現。預算說了算的話，這兩款很聰明。

references.title: Sennheiser finally launches the successor to its ultra-popular Momentum Wireless headphones with Dolby Atmos
I tested the long-awaited Sennheiser Momentum 5
Sennheiser Momentum 5 Wireless vs Sony WH-1000XM6

en.commentary: Two launches define this week. Sennheiser's Momentum 5 Wireless arrived at 399 dollars with Dolby Atmos and a genuinely massive 57 hour battery life with ANC on, and Sony's 1000X THE COLLEXION pushed its spatial audio further with a new V3 processor and three distinct spatial modes. Neither moves my number one. The Sony WH-1000XM6 still wins because it does everything to a very high level with the best all-round noise cancelling and sound on this list, and nothing this week beats it across the board. The COLLEXION is the more interesting story for movie and gaming fans, and its refined spatial tuning is real, but the steep price keeps its value low and it stays at the bottom of the list for now. The Momentum 4 still represents the Sennheiser house sound here, that warm bassy tuning reviewers love, and with the new generation arriving the older model is getting better deals, so I lifted its value a touch. If you want the safest premium pick, buy the XM6. If you watch a lot of films and want spatial that actually impresses, the COLLEXION is worth the stretch. If you just want great sound for less, the Sennheiser tuning at a discount is the smart move this week.

highlights.title: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays the safest premium buy
highlights.body: Even with two high-profile launches this week, the XM6 keeps number one because it scores high on every axis at once. The best blend of noise cancelling, sound, and app control on this list means it remains the headphone I hand to anyone who just wants the right answer.

highlights.title: The 1000X COLLEXION impresses on spatial but not on price
highlights.body: The new V3 processor and three distinct spatial modes for music, cinema, and gaming make this the pick for film and game fans. The tuning is genuinely good, yet the premium asking price keeps its value score low and holds it at the foot of the list.

highlights.title: The Momentum 5 launch makes the Momentum 4 a smarter deal
highlights.body: With the new 399 dollar Momentum 5 arriving, the older Momentum 4 is seeing better pricing while keeping that warm Sennheiser sound and a class-leading battery. That earns it a small value bump and it holds third on sound alone.

highlights.title: Battery life is becoming the new battleground
highlights.body: The Momentum 5's 57 hour rating with ANC on resets expectations for the category. Long battery is no longer a budget compromise, it is a flagship feature, and the brands that ignore it will feel it in next year's rankings.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週有兩款新機定調。Sennheiser Momentum 5 Wireless 開價 399 美金,帶 Dolby Atmos,而且開 ANC 還能撐到誇張的 57 小時。Sony 的 1000X THE COLLEXION 則把空間音效再往上推,搭新的 V3 處理器跟三種獨立空間模式。但這兩台都沒撼動我的第一名。Sony WH-1000XM6 還是贏,因為它每一項都做到很高水準,降噪跟音質的全能表現是榜上最強,這週沒有一台能全面壓過它。COLLEXION 對看電影跟打電動的人比較有看頭,精緻的空間調音是真材實料,可是開價偏高,價值分數被壓低,目前還是排在榜尾。Momentum 4 在榜上代表 Sennheiser 那種溫暖重低音的家族聲底,評測都很愛,新世代上市後舊款開始有比較好的價格,所以我把它的價值稍微拉一點。想要最穩的高階選擇,就買 XM6。常看電影又想要真的有感的空間音效,COLLEXION 值得多花。只想用比較少的錢拿到好聲音,折價的 Sennheiser 調音就是這週聰明選擇。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 還是最穩的高階選擇
highlights.body: 就算這週兩台話題機上市,XM6 還是坐第一,因為它每一項都同時拿高分。降噪、音質加 App 控制的綜合表現是榜上最好,想要直接拿到正確答案的人,我就是推這支。

highlights.title: 1000X COLLEXION 空間音效很猛但價格不友善
highlights.body: 新的 V3 處理器搭音樂、電影、遊戲三種獨立空間模式,讓它成為影音咖的首選。調音是真的好,但偏高的開價把價值分數壓低,讓它先守在榜尾。

highlights.title: Momentum 5 上市讓 Momentum 4 變得更划算
highlights.body: 新的 399 美金 Momentum 5 上市後,舊的 Momentum 4 開始有更好的價格,溫暖的 Sennheiser 聲底跟同級數一數二的續航都還在。價值小幅加分,光靠音質就守住第三。

highlights.title: 續航正在變成新戰場
highlights.body: Momentum 5 開 ANC 還有 57 小時的規格,直接重設這個類別的標準。長續航不再是入門機的妥協,而是旗艦該有的賣點,忽略這點的品牌明年排名會有感。

references.title: Sennheiser MOMENTUM 5 Wireless vs Sony WH-1000XM6: Value or performance?
Sennheiser Momentum 5 Wireless vs Sony WH-1000XM6: which premium wireless headphones are better?
Sennheiser Momentum 5 review: Apple, Sony, and Bose wish they could do this one thing

en.commentary: With Prime Day behind us as of June 26, I am back to ranking these on what the headphones actually deliver, and the order holds firm. The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays at number one because its noise cancellation remains the benchmark. Reviewers this week confirmed Sony runs twelve microphones against the Sennheiser Momentum 5's eight, and that gap shows as a more natural, more complete hush on planes and trains. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra keeps second for the most comfortable clamp in the category and ANC that is right on Sony's heels. The story I want to call out is the Sennheiser Momentum 5 Wireless, which I now rate as the long-haul champion. Reviews this cycle pin its battery at 57 hours with ANC on, nearly double the Sony's 30, and it ships with a user-replaceable battery that should add years to its useful life. I nudged its battery score up to reflect that confirmed figure. Its sound is rich and expressive, genuinely audiophile, so it stays at third just ahead of the Momentum 4 on the strength of that endurance and tuning. Its ANC still softens rather than erases the world, which is why it sits behind Sony and Bose rather than above them. Post Prime Day I also normalized the Soundcore value scores, which had crept up on deal pricing. The Space 2 and Space Q45 are still the budget kings I recommend without hesitation, but at regular pricing their value lands at 9.3 rather than the inflated 9.6. The 1000X ColleXion remains a limited collector edition, priced well above its performance tier, so it stays out of the everyday top ranks.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 holds the crown
highlights.body: Twelve ANC mics versus the Momentum 5's eight give it the most natural, complete hush. The benchmark for travel.

highlights.title: Momentum 5 is the endurance pick
highlights.body: Confirmed 57 hours of ANC playback and a replaceable battery push its battery score up. It is the long-haul flyer's headphone.

highlights.title: Post Prime Day value reset
highlights.body: Soundcore Space 2 and Q45 value scores ease from 9.6 to 9.3 now that deal pricing is gone. Still the budget champions.

highlights.title: Bose Ultra owns comfort
highlights.body: The most relaxed clamp in the field plus ANC right on Sony's heels keep it locked at second.

zh-tw.commentary: Prime Day 6月26號結束了，我把評分拉回耳機真正的實力，這份排名站得很穩。Sony WH-1000XM6 還是第一，它的降噪依然是業界標竿。這週評測證實 Sony 用了十二顆麥克風，Sennheiser Momentum 5 只有八顆，這個差距在飛機跟捷運上聽得出來，Sony 的安靜更自然也更徹底。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第二，夾持感是這級最舒服的，降噪也緊咬 Sony 不放。這輪我最想點名的是 Sennheiser Momentum 5 Wireless，我現在把它定位成長途之王。這週評測把它的續航釘在開降噪 57 小時，幾乎是 Sony 30 小時的兩倍，而且電池可以自己換，這台用個好幾年都沒問題。我把它的續航分數往上調，反映這個被證實的數字。它的聲音飽滿又有感情，是真的發燒等級，所以靠續航跟調音守住第三，壓在 Momentum 4 前面。它的降噪比較像把外界聲音變柔，不是整個抹掉，這就是它排在 Sony 跟 Bose 後面的原因。Prime Day 過後我也把 Soundcore 的 CP 值歸位，之前被折扣價推高了。Space 2 跟 Space Q45 還是我閉著眼睛都會推的平價王，但回到平常售價，CP 值落在 9.3，不是灌水的 9.6。1000X ColleXion 是限量收藏版，售價遠超它的性能級距，所以維持在日常榜的後段。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 穩坐冠軍
highlights.body: 十二顆降噪麥克風對上 Momentum 5 的八顆，安靜得最自然也最徹底，旅行就看它。

highlights.title: Momentum 5 是續航之選
highlights.body: 確認開降噪 57 小時加上電池可換，續航分數往上調。長途飛行就帶它。

highlights.title: Prime Day 後 CP 值歸位
highlights.body: 折扣價沒了，Soundcore Space 2 跟 Q45 的 CP 值從 9.6 回到 9.3，還是平價王沒變。

highlights.title: Bose Ultra 舒適度第一
highlights.body: 全場最放鬆的夾持感，降噪又緊咬 Sony，穩穩鎖在第二。

en.commentary: With Prime Day now wrapped, I have reset this list to normal retail footing so the ranking reflects everyday value rather than a temporary discount window. The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one because it is the most balanced flagship you can buy, and recent measurements back that up: it cut average loudness by about 87 percent, edging the Bose figure, and its warmer, weightier tuning pulls detail beautifully across genres. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second and remains the comfort champion, with plusher earcups that also help its passive isolation, so it is the one I hand to frequent flyers who value all-day wear over a hair more sound presence. The Sennheiser Momentum 5 and 4 keep their spots on class-leading battery life and a rich, natural signature, and I still rate the Momentum 4 as the smartest value in the premium tier. Soundcore's Space 2 and Space Q45 remain my budget heroes, punching far above their price on battery and everyday ANC. I adjusted the Sony Collexion limited edition down a rank to keep scores and ranks consistent now that its inflated launch pricing settles. If you want the best all-rounder today, buy the XM6, and choose the Bose if comfort on long flights matters most.

highlights.title: Back to normal pricing
highlights.body: With Prime Day over, I reset the list to everyday retail so the ranking reflects real value rather than a temporary discount.

highlights.title: Sony XM6 leads on balance
highlights.body: It cut average loudness by about 87 percent in testing and pairs class-leading ANC with a warm, detailed tuning across genres.

highlights.title: Bose owns comfort
highlights.body: The QuietComfort Ultra keeps second on plush earcups that also boost passive isolation, my pick for frequent flyers.

highlights.title: Budget heroes
highlights.body: Soundcore's Space 2 and Space Q45 punch far above their price on battery life and everyday noise cancellation.

zh-tw.commentary: Prime Day 結束了，我把這份榜單重新拉回正常零售基準，讓排名反映日常價值，而不是那段短暫的折扣期。Sony WH-1000XM6 續坐第一，因為它是你買得到最均衡的旗艦，最近的實測也證明這點：它把平均音量降了約 87%，小勝 Bose 的數字，偏暖又有重量的調音在各種曲風都能把細節撈得很漂亮。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守第二，還是舒適度王者，耳墊更厚也順便加強了被動隔音，所以這副我都推給重視整天配戴、不太在意那一點點聲音存在感的空中飛人。Sennheiser Momentum 5 跟 4 靠同級最強的續航跟豐富自然的音色守住位置，我還是覺得 Momentum 4 是高階裡最聰明的 CP 值。Soundcore Space 2 跟 Space Q45 依舊是我的平價英雄，續航跟日常降噪都遠超它的價格。Sony Collexion 限量版我往下調一名，讓分數跟排名一致，畢竟它上市的哄抬價現在也回穩了。今天想要最強全能就買 XM6，長途飛行舒適度擺第一就選 Bose。

highlights.title: 回歸正常價格
highlights.body: Prime Day 結束，我把榜單重設回日常零售，讓排名反映真實價值，而不是短暫折扣。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 最均衡
highlights.body: 實測把平均音量降約 87%，同級最強降噪配上偏暖又細節豐富的調音，各種曲風都吃得開。

highlights.title: Bose 舒適稱王
highlights.body: QuietComfort Ultra 耳墊厚實還順便強化被動隔音，守第二，我最推給空中飛人。

highlights.title: 平價英雄
highlights.body: Soundcore Space 2 跟 Space Q45 續航跟日常降噪都遠超它的價位。

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one this week, and the case for it stays airtight. Its adaptive processing uses multiple mics to read your surroundings and excels at killing the low-frequency drone of planes, trains, and city traffic, which is exactly what I want ANC to do. Pair that 9.6 noise cancellation with a 9.5 sound score and wide codec support and it earns its place at the top. The theme reviewers keep repeating this month is how close the field has become at the summit, and I agree, which is why my top five sits within a tight band. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds rank two on the most comfortable, pressure-free fit here at a 9.5, the pick for anyone who wears headphones all day. The Sennheiser Momentum 5 keeps rank three for the best sound-per-hour balance, with a 9.4 sound score and a 9.4 battery that runs through a long-haul flight. This year's big releases, the AirPods Max 2, the Sony 1000X Collexion, and the Momentum 5, have all landed and settled into the ranking rather than reshuffling it, so I am holding scores steady. Value shoppers should still look hard at the Soundcore Space 2, which delivers a 9.5 battery and a 9.3 value score for a fraction of flagship money.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps the top spot
highlights.body: Adaptive multi-mic ANC crushes low-frequency drone from planes and traffic, and a 9.6 cancellation plus 9.5 sound score hold it at rank one.

highlights.title: The top of the field is tight
highlights.body: Reviewers keep noting how close the summit has become, which is why my top five sits within a narrow scoring band.

highlights.title: Bose Ultra wins on comfort
highlights.body: Its pressure-free fit scores a 9.5, my pick for anyone who keeps headphones on all day.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 is the value play
highlights.body: A 9.5 battery and 9.3 value score deliver flagship-adjacent listening for a fraction of the price.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Sony WH-1000XM6 依舊是我的第一名，理由依然滴水不漏。它的自適應處理用多支麥克風去讀你周遭的環境，特別擅長把飛機、火車、市區車流那種低頻嗡嗡聲抹掉，這正是我對降噪的核心要求。9.6 的降噪配上 9.5 的音質分數，再加上廣泛的編碼支援，站上榜首理所當然。這個月評測反覆在講的一個主題，是頂端這幾支的差距已經小到不行，我也認同，所以我的前五名分數就擠在很窄的一個帶狀區間裡。第二名 Bose QuietComfort Ultra 靠的是這裡最舒服、戴久了耳朵也不會被夾到脹的貼合感，9.5 分，整天掛著耳機的人選它準沒錯。第三名 Sennheiser Momentum 5 則是音質對續航的平衡最好，音質 9.4 分，電池 9.4 分，撐過一趟長程飛行沒問題。今年幾支重磅新品，AirPods Max 2、Sony 1000X Collexion、還有 Momentum 5，都已經上市並在榜單裡各就各位，沒有把排名洗牌，所以我把分數維持穩定。想撿 CP 值的人還是可以認真看 Soundcore Space 2，電池 9.5 分、價值 9.3 分，用旗艦的一小部分預算就換到很接近的聆聽體驗。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 續坐第一
highlights.body: 自適應多麥克風降噪把飛機跟車流的低頻嗡嗡壓下去，降噪 9.6、音質 9.5，穩守榜首。

highlights.title: 頂端差距超小
highlights.body: 評測一再提到榜首群已經貼得很近，這也是我前五名分數擠成一小段的原因。

highlights.title: Bose Ultra 舒適度取勝
highlights.body: 無壓感貼合拿到 9.5 分，整天戴耳機的人我先推它。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 是 CP 值之選
highlights.body: 電池 9.5、價值 9.3，用旗艦一小部分的錢換到很接近的聽感。

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps my number one because it is the most complete pair here, and reviewers who lived with it for six months against the Bose landed the same way. RTINGS still rates it the best noise-cancelling headphones tested, and the reason is balance, it cancels slightly more sound at both ends of the frequency range than anything else, the sound is warm with real weight and presence, and the app gives you the deepest EQ customization in the category. Add 30 hours of battery and you have a pair that does everything well rather than one thing brilliantly. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds a very close second, and if pure silence and all-day comfort are your priorities it is the one to buy, its cancellation blocks out essentially everything and the amply padded cups fatigue slower than Sony's thinner headband over long flights. Reviewers this week reaffirmed that comfort edge, and it is why the Bose stays the recommendation for frequent flyers. The Sennheiser Momentum 5 stays third as the audiophile's pick, its sound quality is the most refined here and battery life is excellent. No ranking changes this week. Sony wins on balance, Bose on comfort and silence, and Sennheiser on pure sound, and each still owns its lane.

highlights.title: Sony XM6 is the most complete
highlights.body: It cancels slightly more across the frequency range, sounds warm and weighty, and offers the deepest EQ, holding the top spot.

highlights.title: Bose Ultra for silence and comfort
highlights.body: Its cancellation blocks essentially everything and the amply padded cups fatigue slower over long flights, the frequent-flyer pick at rank two.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 5 for audiophiles
highlights.body: The most refined sound here with excellent battery makes it the pick when sound quality leads, steady at rank three.

highlights.title: Six-month test confirms the order
highlights.body: Reviewers who lived with both for six months reaffirmed Sony's balance and Bose's comfort edge, matching the rankings.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 守住我的第一，因為它是這裡最全面的一副，跟 Bose 對比用了六個月的評測人也得出同樣結論。RTINGS 依然把它評為測過最好的降噪耳機，原因就是均衡，它在高低頻兩端的降噪都比其他任何一副再多壓一點，聲音溫暖、有實在的重量跟存在感，App 給的 EQ 客製化深度也是品類裡最深的。再加上 30 小時續航，你得到的是一副每件事都做得好、而不是只有一件事特別強的耳機。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 以很接近的差距守第二，如果你的優先是純粹的安靜跟整天舒適，就是買它，它的降噪基本上把所有東西都擋掉，飽滿的耳墊在長途飛行中比 Sony 較薄的頭帶更慢累。這週評測又肯定了這個舒適優勢，這就是 Bose 一直是常飛族推薦的原因。Sennheiser Momentum 5 守第三，是發燒友之選，它的音質在這裡最精緻，續航也很好。這週排名沒動。Sony 贏在均衡，Bose 贏在舒適跟安靜，Sennheiser 贏在純音質，各自都還守著自己那條路線。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 最全面
highlights.body: 全頻段降噪再多壓一點，聲音溫暖有重量，EQ 最深，穩守第一。

highlights.title: 要安靜與舒適選 Bose Ultra
highlights.body: 降噪基本擋掉一切，飽滿耳墊長途飛行更慢累，是常飛族之選，排第二。

highlights.title: 發燒友選 Sennheiser Momentum 5
highlights.body: 這裡最精緻的音質加優異續航，是音質掛帥時的選擇，穩守第三。

highlights.title: 六個月實測印證排名
highlights.body: 與兩副共處六個月的評測再度肯定 Sony 的均衡與 Bose 的舒適優勢，與排名一致。

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps my top spot, and a fresh round of long-term testing this week backs it up. After six months of daily use, reviewers still call it the pick over the Bose in a straight fight, and I agree. The reason is range: 30 hours of battery, a proper 10-band EQ against Bose's 3, more ANC modes, and spatial audio that sounds better in practice. RTINGS also still ranks it the best noise cancelling headphones they have tested. It does the whole job and does it consistently. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second, and I want to be fair about why it is so close. Its passive isolation is slightly better thanks to plusher ear cushions, and those cushions fatigue more slowly over a long flight, so if comfort on all-day wear is your priority, Bose is the one. The Sennheiser Momentum 5 stays third for anyone who leads with sound quality, its tuning is the most refined here and battery life is huge. Further down, the Soundcore Space 2 and Sony WH-CH720N keep flying the value flag with strong ANC for the money. No new flagship shipped this week, so I am holding the order and letting feature range and comfort split the top two the way they have for months.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 wins the all-rounder crown
highlights.body: 30-hour battery, a 10-band EQ, more ANC modes, and better spatial audio give it the widest feature range. Six months of testing this week still put it ahead, and it stays at number one.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra for comfort
highlights.body: Plusher ear cushions give slightly better passive isolation and fatigue more slowly on long flights. If all-day wearing comfort leads your list, this is the flagship I would pick.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 5 for pure sound
highlights.body: The most refined tuning in this group paired with huge battery life makes it my choice for listeners who put sound quality first and want to forget about charging.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 punches above its price
highlights.body: Strong ANC and long battery for a fraction of flagship money keep it as the value pick I recommend when budget matters more than the last few percent of polish.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 這週還是我的第一，剛好有一輪長期評測幫它背書。連續每天用六個月後，評測還是說它跟 Bose 正面對決時是首選，我也認同。原因在於全面：30 小時續航、真正的 10 段 EQ 對上 Bose 的 3 段、更多降噪模式、空間音效實際聽也更好。RTINGS 也還是把它排在他們測過的降噪耳機第一名。它把整件事做好，而且很穩定。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守住第二，我想公平說明它為什麼咬這麼緊。它的被動隔音因為耳墊更厚實而稍微好一點，長途飛行時那副耳墊也比較不容易讓耳朵累，所以你要是最在意整天配戴的舒適度，就選 Bose。Sennheiser Momentum 5 第三，主打音質的人選它，調音是這裡最細膩的，續航也很誇張。再往下，Soundcore Space 2 跟 Sony WH-CH720N 繼續扛 CP 值大旗，這個價位降噪很有料。這週沒有新旗艦上市，所以我維持原榜，讓功能全面性跟舒適度像這幾個月一樣去分前兩名。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 全能王
highlights.body: 30 小時續航、10 段 EQ、更多降噪模式、更好的空間音效，功能最全面。這週六個月長測還是把它排前面，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 主打舒適
highlights.body: 更厚實的耳墊帶來稍好的被動隔音，長途飛行也比較不累耳。整天配戴舒適度掛帥的話，我會選這副旗艦。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 5 純聽音質
highlights.body: 這群裡最細膩的調音配上誇張續航，是我推給音質優先、又懶得常充電的人的選擇。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 越級打
highlights.body: 用零頭價格給你有料的降噪跟長續航。預算比那最後幾趴的細膩度更重要時，它就是我推的 CP 值選擇。
