en.commentary: Prime Day 2026 wrapped on June 26, so this week I reset the rankings back to pure product merit and let the discount noise fade out. A few budget models had drifted up on the strength of temporary price cuts, and with those cuts gone I trimmed their value scores back to sustainable levels. The result is a board that reflects how these headphones actually perform rather than what they briefly cost. The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one. RTINGS still rates it the best noise canceller they have tested, and the twelve-mic QN3 processor plus a proper 10-band EQ give it the most complete package for the money. If you want one pair to do everything, this is it. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second and remains the comfort and isolation champion. Its passive seal and plush cushions edge out Sony on raw quiet and on all-day wearability, so long-haul flyers should shortlist it first. Sennheiser's Momentum 5 and 4 keep the middle of the podium on sound quality and battery life that genuinely outlast a work trip. The Soundcore Space 2 is still the value standout, but at its everyday price rather than a Prime Day flash deal, which is the honest way to rank it. Across the board the flagships earn their spots on merit this week, and that is exactly how it should read once the sale banners come down.

highlights.title: Rankings reset to product merit after Prime Day
highlights.body: With the June 26 sale over, I trimmed the temporary discount-driven value bumps so the board reflects real performance rather than a flash price.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 stays the all-rounder to beat
highlights.body: RTINGS still calls it the best noise canceller tested, and the twelve-mic QN3 processor plus a 10-band EQ make it the most complete pick at the price.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra owns comfort and isolation
highlights.body: A tighter passive seal and plusher cushions give it the edge for long flights and all-day wear, so frequent flyers should try it first.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 is the honest value pick
highlights.body: It remains the standout budget choice, now ranked on its everyday price instead of a Prime Day flash deal, which is the fair way to score it.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 的 Prime Day 在 6 月 26 號收攤，所以這週我把整份榜單重新拉回純粹看產品實力，讓折扣造成的雜訊退場。前陣子有幾款平價機因為限時降價一路往上飄，現在特價結束，我把它們的 CP 值分數修回可以長期站得住的水準。這樣一來，這份榜單反映的是這些耳機真正的實力，而不是它一時賣多少錢。Sony WH-1000XM6 還是我的第一名。RTINGS 到現在都還說它是測過降噪最強的一款，十二顆麥克風的 QN3 晶片再加上完整的 10 段 EQ，讓它在這個價位的整體表現最全面。你只想買一副全能耳機，就是它了。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守住第二，依然是舒適跟隔音的王者。它的被動密封加上厚實的耳墊，在純安靜跟整天配戴的舒適度上贏過 Sony，常搭長途飛機的人第一個就該把它列入口袋名單。Sennheiser Momentum 5 跟 4 靠音質，還有出差整趟都撐得住的續航，穩住中段。Soundcore Space 2 還是 CP 值代表，但這次是用它平常的售價來排，不是 Prime Day 的閃電折扣價，這樣排才誠實。整體來看，這週旗艦機都是靠實力站上位置，特價旗幟撤下來之後，本來就該長這樣。

highlights.title: Prime Day 後榜單回歸產品實力
highlights.body: 6 月 26 號特價結束，我把那些靠限時折扣衝上來的 CP 值分數修回，讓榜單反映真實表現，不是一時的便宜價。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 還是最強全能王
highlights.body: RTINGS 到現在都說它降噪最強，十二顆麥克風的 QN3 晶片加上 10 段 EQ，是這個價位整體最全面的選擇。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 舒適隔音稱霸
highlights.body: 更緊的被動密封加上更厚的耳墊，長途飛行跟整天配戴都贏一截，常飛的人第一個該試它。

Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra: which flagship is best?

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps my number one this week, and the latest head-to-head testing confirms why. RTINGS still rates it the best noise-cancelling pair overall, and after living with it I lean on two things: class-leading ANC that flattens jet engines and office chatter alike, and a 10-band EQ that lets me tune the sound exactly how I want. That level of control is rare and it matters daily. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra stays a very close second, and I want to give it full credit for what it does best. Its passive isolation is slightly ahead thanks to plusher earcups, and the comfort over a long flight is genuinely better, with padding that fatigues more slowly. If your priority is wearing them for six hours straight without noticing, Bose is the call. The Sennheiser Momentum 5 and 4 hold the next tier on sound and battery, and the Momentum 4 in particular remains my value flagship pick with its marathon battery life. Reviewers keep calling this a photo finish at the top, and I agree, so nothing moved this week. Pick Sony for sound tuning and ANC, pick Bose for comfort, and either way you are getting a genuine flagship.

highlights.body: RTINGS still rates it the best overall. Class-leading ANC plus a 10-band EQ for precise sound tuning is why I keep reaching for it.

highlights.title: Bose Ultra owns comfort

highlights.title: A photo finish up top

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Sony WH-1000XM6 續坐我的第一，最新的正面對決測試也證明了原因。RTINGS 到現在還是把它評為最強降噪耳機，實際天天用下來，我最看重兩點：業界頂尖的降噪，飛機引擎跟辦公室閒聊一起壓平，還有 10 段 EQ 讓我把聲音調成我要的樣子。這種調整自由度很少見，而且每天都用得到。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 緊咬在第二，我要把它最強的地方講足。它的被動隔音靠更厚的耳墊稍微領先，長途飛行的舒適度是真的更好，襯墊悶久了也比較不累。你最在意的是連戴六小時都沒感覺，那就選 Bose。Sennheiser Momentum 5 跟 4 靠音質跟續航守住下一個級距，尤其 Momentum 4 那馬拉松級的電量，依舊是我的性價比旗艦首選。評測一直說頂端是照相定勝負那種近，我同意，所以這週沒有變動。要調音跟降噪選 Sony，要舒適選 Bose，反正兩台都是貨真價實的旗艦。

references.title: I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs. Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 Headphones: Review
Sony WH-1000XM6 The Best Noise Canceling Wireless Headphones

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 holds my number one, and the latest six-month comparisons against the Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 keep confirming why. Sony wins on the things you live with daily: a superior 10-band EQ that lets you actually dial in the sound, more noise-canceling modes, and longer battery life. The HD noise processor QN3 and its twelve-microphone array still deliver adaptive cancellation that handles jet engines and office chatter without the sound turning hollow. When I want one pair to do everything, this is it. Bose stays a close second, and I nudged its noise-cancellation score up to 9.7 this week. The consensus from Tom's Guide and Rolling Stone is that the QuietComfort Ultra 2 blocks out ambient noise more completely than anything else on the market, bar none, and its plusher earcups fatigue more slowly on long flights. If total silence and all-day comfort are your priorities over sound customization, Bose is the honest pick. The Sennheiser Momentum 5 and Momentum 4 stay third and fourth as the audiophile's value play, both delivering richer, more detailed sound and monster battery life for the money. I made one score adjustment, Bose noise cancellation to 9.7, to reflect the current review consensus, and kept every rank steady. This is a settled top tier, and nothing this week justified moving positions.

highlights.title: XM6 wins on daily livability
highlights.body: A 10-band EQ, more ANC modes, and longer battery. The QN3 processor with twelve mics keeps cancellation adaptive without hollowing the sound.

highlights.title: Bose edges the pure silence crown
highlights.body: Reviewers call the QuietComfort Ultra 2 the most complete noise blocker on the market. I bumped its ANC score to 9.7 to match.

highlights.title: Bose comfort for long flights

highlights.title: Momentum 5 and 4 lead on value
highlights.body: Both Sennheisers deliver rich, detailed sound and huge battery life for the money, holding third and fourth for audiophiles on a budget.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 守住我的第一名，最近那些跟 Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 對比半年的長期評測，一直在印證原因。Sony 贏在你每天實際會用到的地方：更強的 10 段 EQ 讓你真的能把聲音調到位、更多降噪模式、電池也更耐。HD 降噪處理器 QN3 加上十二支麥克風陣列，那個自適應降噪面對飛機引擎跟辦公室人聲都壓得下來，聲音又不會變得空洞。想要一副耳機打天下，就是它了。Bose 緊跟在第二，這週我把它的降噪分數往上調到 9.7。Tom's Guide 跟 Rolling Stone 的共識是，QuietComfort Ultra 2 隔絕環境噪音的完整程度市面上沒對手，而且它更厚的耳罩在長程飛行上比較不會壓到耳朵痛。如果你把徹底安靜跟整天配戴的舒適擺在音效自訂前面，Bose 是很誠實的選擇。Sennheiser Momentum 5 跟 Momentum 4 守第三第四，是發燒友的 CP 值牌，兩副都給你更飽滿、更有細節的聲音，還有很誇張的電池續航。這週我只調一個分數，把 Bose 降噪拉到 9.7 反映目前評測共識，其餘名次全部維持。這個頂段班已經很穩了，這週沒有任何理由去動位置。

highlights.title: XM6 贏在每天好用
highlights.body: 10 段 EQ、更多降噪模式、電池更耐。QN3 處理器加十二麥克風讓降噪自適應又不空洞。

highlights.title: Bose 純安靜略勝一籌
highlights.body: 評測稱 QuietComfort Ultra 2 是市面上隔音最徹底的一副。我把它降噪分數調到 9.7 對上這個共識。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra: Battle of the ANC heavyweights

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one, and this week's long-term testing settles the question for me. In controlled measurements the XM6 cut average loudness by 87 percent against the Bose QuietComfort Ultra's 85 percent, so Sony still owns the outright noise-cancelling crown. Add its 10-band EQ, and you get the most tunable flagship sound in the category, which is why it leads. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds a strong second, and I want to be clear about its real advantage. Its earcups and headband carry more padding, so it fatigues more slowly on long flights, and reviewers this week again gave Bose the comfort round outright. If you wear headphones for six hours straight, that plush fit matters as much as any spec. So my split stays the same: Sony for peak cancellation and sound control, Bose when all-day comfort is your first priority. Sennheiser's Momentum 5 keeps third on the back of its sound quality and genuinely long battery life, and it remains my pick for anyone who cares most about tonal accuracy. Further down, the Soundcore Space 2 and Space Q45 are still the value story I keep repeating: most of the flagship experience, roughly nine out of ten on value, for a fraction of the price. If budget leads your decision, start there and you will not feel shortchanged.

highlights.title: Sony XM6 owns cancellation
highlights.body: Measured cutting average loudness by 87 percent against Bose's 85 percent, plus a 10-band EQ for the most tunable flagship sound. That combination keeps it at number one.

highlights.title: Bose wins all-day comfort
highlights.body: More padding on the cups and headband means it fatigues slower on long flights. Reviewers this week gave it the comfort round outright, which is why it holds a strong second.

highlights.title: Pick by your priority
highlights.body: Sony for peak noise cancellation and sound control, Bose when six-hour comfort comes first. Both are flagship-good, so choose the one that fits your ears and routine.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 5 for tone
highlights.body: Its sound quality and long battery keep it third. My pick for listeners who care most about tonal accuracy over the last few percent of cancellation.

highlights.title: Soundcore is the value play
highlights.body: The Space 2 and Space Q45 land around nine on value, delivering most of the flagship experience for far less. Start here if budget leads your decision.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 我還是放第一，這週的長期實測幫我把問題定案了。在受控測量裡，XM6 把平均音量降低了 87%，Bose QuietComfort Ultra 是 85%，所以純降噪這頂王冠還是 Sony 的。再加上它的 10 段 EQ，你拿到的是這個類別裡最能調校的旗艦聲音，這就是它領先的原因。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 守住強勢的第二，我想把它真正的強項講清楚。它的耳罩跟頭帶用料更厚，長途飛行時比較慢才會覺得累，這週評測又一次把舒適這一回合直接判給 Bose。你如果一戴就是六小時，那份柔軟服貼跟任何規格一樣重要。所以我的分法沒變：要極致降噪跟聲音控制選 Sony，要整天配戴的舒適擺第一就選 Bose。Sennheiser Momentum 5 靠音質跟真的很長的續航守第三，最在乎音色準確的人，我還是推它。再往下，Soundcore Space 2 跟 Space Q45 還是我一直在講的划算故事：旗艦體驗的八九成，價值分大概九分，價格只要一小部分。預算是你第一考量的話，從這裡開始，你不會覺得被虧待。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 降噪最強
highlights.body: 實測把平均音量降低 87%,勝過 Bose 的 85%,再加 10 段 EQ,是最能調校的旗艦聲音。這組合讓它守住第一。

highlights.title: Bose 整天配戴最舒服
highlights.body: 耳罩跟頭帶用料更厚,長途飛行比較慢才累。這週評測直接把舒適判給它,所以它守住強勢第二。

highlights.title: 依你的重點挑
highlights.body: 要極致降噪跟聲音控制選 Sony,要六小時舒適擺第一就選 Bose。兩者都是旗艦水準,挑合你耳朵跟習慣的那副。

highlights.title: 重音色選 Sennheiser Momentum 5
highlights.body: 音質跟長續航讓它守第三。比起最後那幾趴降噪,更在乎音色準確的人,我推它。

highlights.title: Soundcore 是划算之選
highlights.body: Space 2 跟 Space Q45 價值分約九分,用一小部分價格給你旗艦八九成的體驗。預算掛帥就從這開始。

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps my top spot this week, and it holds it because it is the most complete pair I have tested: excellent sound, class leading noise cancellation, a smart app, and battery that outlasts long haul flights. RTINGS still calls it the best headphones they have tested, and What Hi-Fi gives it best in class honors for 2026, which matches my own listening. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second and remains the comfort champion, with plush earcups and slightly stronger passive isolation that make marathon wear easier. Reviewers this month leaned Bose for pure quiet and Sony for the fuller feature set, which is exactly how I split my recommendation. The Sennheiser Momentum 5 stays third for listeners who chase warm, detailed sound and very long battery. The Momentum 4 sits fourth as the value flagship, still a smart buy now that its price has settled. Apple AirPods Max keep sixth for iPhone owners who value the ecosystem glue. Nothing shipped this week to move the order, so I held steady. My honest advice: pick Sony if you want the best all rounder, Bose if comfort and raw silence rule your day, and the Momentum 4 if you want most of the flagship experience for less.

references.title: I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months, and there's a clear winner
The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones: which are best?

en.commentary:
The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one, and a fresh six-month long-term test from Tom's Guide this week reached the same verdict. RTINGS still measures it as the best noise canceller they have tested, cutting average loudness by about 87 percent, and Sony pairs that with a proper 10-band EQ that lets you tune the sound exactly how you like. For the traveler who wants the quietest cabin and the most control, this is the set to buy.

The Bose QuietComfort Ultra sits right behind and honestly wins on two counts that matter: comfort and passive isolation. Its earcups are more generously padded, so they fatigue slowly on a long-haul flight, and that plush seal blocks a touch more sound before the electronics even kick in. If you prioritize all-day wearing comfort over EQ tinkering, Bose is the smarter buy.

Sennheiser's Momentum 5 and 4 remain the audiophile-leaning choices, delivering the richest, most detailed sound in the lineup with battery life that outlasts everything. The new Sennheiser HDB 630 continues to impress on sound quality. For value, the Soundcore Space 2 is still the budget hero, offering shockingly capable ANC and 9-plus hours of listening for a fraction of the flagship price. Pick by priority and none of these will let you down.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 is the all-round best
highlights.body: RTINGS measures the strongest ANC they have tested, and a fresh six-month test this week confirmed the win. A 10-band EQ gives you full control of the sound.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra wins on comfort
highlights.body: More generously padded earcups fatigue slowly on long flights, and the plush seal blocks extra sound before the electronics engage. The pick for all-day wear.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 is the value hero
highlights.body: Shockingly capable noise cancelling and 9-plus hours of playback for a fraction of the flagship price. Proof you do not have to overspend for real quiet.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WH-1000XM6 繼續是我的第一名，這週 Tom's Guide 一篇長達半年的長測也給出一樣的結論。RTINGS 到現在還是量到它是他們測過降噪最強的，平均音量砍掉約 87%，而且 Sony 還配了完整的 10 段 EQ，讓你把聲音調成自己愛的樣子。要艙內最安靜、又要最多調整空間的旅人，就是這副。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra 緊追在後，老實說它在兩個很關鍵的地方贏了：舒適度跟被動隔音。它的耳墊更厚實，長程航班戴久了也比較不會夾得難受，而且那層厚墊在電子降噪還沒作用前就先擋掉多一點噪音。你如果戴整天的舒適比調 EQ 更重要，Bose 是更聰明的選擇。

Sennheiser Momentum 5 跟 4 還是偏發燒的選擇，聲音是這排最厚實細膩的，續航又比誰都久。新的 Sennheiser HDB 630 音質一樣讓人驚艷。要划算的話，Soundcore Space 2 依舊是平價英雄，降噪好到嚇人，還有 9 小時以上的續航，價格只要旗艦的一小截。看重點挑，這幾副都不會讓你後悔。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 全能第一
highlights.body: RTINGS 量到它降噪最強，這週半年長測也再度確認奪冠。10 段 EQ 讓你完全掌控聲音走向。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 贏在舒適
highlights.body: 耳墊更厚實，長程航班戴久不夾臉，厚墊還在電子降噪前先擋掉多一點噪音。要戴整天就選它。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 2 平價英雄
highlights.body: 降噪好到嚇人，9 小時以上續航，價格只要旗艦一小截。證明想要真安靜不必砸大錢。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one this week, and the latest long-term testing keeps backing the call. It leads because it delivers the most complete package, top-tier cancellation that stays comfortable across an eight-hour flight, roughly 30 hours of battery, and the deepest sound customization with a 10-band EQ and more listening modes than anyone else. RTINGS again names it the best noise-cancelling headphone tested, which matches what I hear on a busy commute. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds a clear second because it still cancels marginally more raw noise than anything on the market, and its plush padding fatigues slowly on very long wears, which is the reason frequent flyers keep choosing it. Reviewers running the two side by side for months land where I do: Bose edges pure silence, but the Sony wins on versatility, comfort tuning, and battery, so it is the easier one pair to own for flights, the office, and the couch. The Sennheiser Momentum 5 and Momentum 4 stay strong for listeners who want a richer, more detailed signature and marathon battery life, and the Soundcore Space picks remain my value champions when you want most of the experience for a fraction of the price. Nothing this week reorders the list. If you want the safest premium buy, the XM6 fits the brief. If pure silence on a long-haul flight is your priority above all else, the Bose is the one to audition first.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 stays the all-rounder
highlights.body: Top-tier ANC, about 30 hours of battery, and the deepest EQ keep it at rank one.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra edges pure silence
highlights.body: Slightly stronger raw cancellation and slow-fatigue padding keep it the frequent-flyer favorite.

highlights.title: Reviewers agree on the split
highlights.body: Six-month testing lands the same way: Bose for silence, Sony for versatility and comfort.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space leads on value
highlights.body: Most of the flagship experience for a fraction of the price makes it my budget champion.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Sony WH-1000XM6 還是我的第一名，最新的長期評測也持續幫這個選擇背書。它排第一，是因為整體最完整，頂級的降噪還能戴八小時飛行不悶，約 30 小時續航，加上最深的音場自訂，10 段 EQ 跟比誰都多的聆聽模式。RTINGS 又把它列為測過最強的降噪耳機，這跟我在吵鬧通勤路上聽到的感受一致。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 穩坐第二，因為它純降噪的量還是市面上最強的一點點，加上厚實的耳墊在超長時間配戴下疲勞來得慢，這也是常搭飛機的人一直選它的理由。把兩支拿去連續比好幾個月的評測，結論跟我一樣，Bose 純安靜略勝，Sony 贏在全能、舒適調校跟續航，所以要選一支通吃飛機、辦公室跟沙發的，Sony 比較好入手。想要更濃、更多細節的聲底加上馬拉松續航，Sennheiser Momentum 5 跟 Momentum 4 還是很強，想用零頭價格拿到大部分體驗，Soundcore Space 系列仍是我的性價比冠軍。這週沒有動到排名。要最穩的高階買法就選 XM6，長程飛行只在乎純安靜的話，Bose 是先去試聽的那支。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 續當全能王
highlights.body: 頂級降噪、約 30 小時續航、加上最深的 EQ，第一名穩穩的。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 純安靜略勝
highlights.body: 純降噪量稍強、耳墊久戴不易疲勞，仍是常搭機族的最愛。

highlights.title: 評測結論一致
highlights.body: 連比六個月結果一樣，Bose 拚安靜，Sony 拚全能跟舒適。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 性價比最強
highlights.body: 零頭價格拿到大部分旗艦體驗，是我的省錢冠軍。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs. Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 Headphones: Review

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 keeps my top spot, and the six-month long-term comparisons landing this week back that call. It cancels slightly more sound at both ends of the frequency range than anything else I have tested, pairs that with a warmer, weightier tuning that most people simply enjoy more, and still delivers 30 hours of battery. For an all-round flagship you can wear anywhere, it is the one I recommend first. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra stays a very close second, and reviewers this cycle keep pointing to why. Its passive isolation and plush ear cushions give it a comfort edge for long-haul wear, and its auto-sleep mode that powers down the moment you take them off is the kind of quiet convenience that adds up daily. If comfort over marathon sessions is your priority, it earns the nod. Sennheiser's Momentum 5 holds firm in the sound-first tier with class-leading battery life, and the value end stays strong with Soundcore's Space lineup delivering genuinely capable ANC for a fraction of flagship money. Nothing this week reshuffles the order. The Sony versus Bose race remains as tight as ever, which is great news for buyers. My advice holds. Choose the XM6 for the best all-round package, and the Bose if all-day comfort is what you truly weigh.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 stays number one
highlights.body: It cancels slightly more at both frequency extremes, tunes warmer and weightier, and lasts 30 hours. The flagship I recommend first.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra wins on comfort
highlights.body: Plush cushions and strong passive isolation suit long-haul wear, and the auto-sleep mode that powers down on removal is a daily convenience.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 5 for sound-first buyers
highlights.body: It holds the audiophile-leaning tier with class-leading battery life, an easy pick when tuning and stamina matter most.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space keeps value strong
highlights.body: Genuinely capable ANC for a fraction of flagship money, still the smart choice for anyone who wants most of the experience for far less.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 這週繼續守住我的第一名，這週陸續出爐的半年長期對比也支持這個判斷。它在高低頻兩端的降噪都比我測過的任何一副再多壓一點，配上更暖、更有份量的調音，這是多數人單純聽起來就更喜歡的走向，而且還有 30 小時續航。想要一副走到哪都能戴的全能旗艦，它就是我第一個推薦的。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 穩坐貼身的第二名，這一輪評測一直點出原因。它的被動隔音加上柔軟的耳墊，在長時間配戴上有舒適度優勢，而那個一摘下就自動休眠的功能，是那種每天累積下來很有感的小便利。如果馬拉松式配戴的舒適度是你的第一優先，它值得你點頭。Sennheiser Momentum 5 在音質派這一層站得很穩，續航更是同級數一數二，調音跟續航最重要時很好挑。划算這端也很強，Soundcore 的 Space 系列用旗艦一小部分的價錢就給你真的夠用的降噪。這週名次沒有洗牌，Sony 跟 Bose 這場競爭依然貼得很緊，對買家是大好消息。我的建議不變。要最全面的整體體驗選 XM6，真正在意整天舒適就選 Bose。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 穩坐第一
highlights.body: 高低頻兩端都再多壓一點降噪，調音更暖更有份量，續航 30 小時。這是我第一個推薦的旗艦。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 舒適度取勝
highlights.body: 柔軟耳墊加上扎實被動隔音，適合長時間配戴，一摘下就自動休眠的設計也是每天有感的小便利。

highlights.title: 音質派選 Sennheiser Momentum 5
highlights.body: 在音質派這層站得很穩，續航又是同級前段，調音跟續航最重要時很好挑。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space 撐起划算這端
highlights.body: 用旗艦一小部分的價錢給你真的夠用的降噪，想花少少的錢拿到大部分體驗，它依然是聰明選擇。

references.title: I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months
The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra (2nd Gen): which is best?

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one this week, and the long-term reviews landing in July back the call. After six months of testing, Tom's Guide still rates the XM6 as the strongest all-rounder, with the measured noise cancellation leading the category and a 10-band EQ that lets you shape the sound far more precisely than rivals allow. The battery also outlasts the Bose in daily use, which matters more than spec sheets once you live with a pair. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second and earns it on comfort. Reviewers consistently name the 2nd Gen the most comfortable over-ear for long sessions, with better-padded cushions that also lift passive isolation. If your day is back-to-back flights or an eight-hour desk shift, that comfort edge is real. Sennheiser keeps two models in the mix at three and four, the Momentum 5 and Momentum 4, both prized for a rich, detailed signature and genuinely long battery life. The Sennheiser HDB 630 sits fifth as the audiophile-leaning pick with excellent tonal balance. Apple AirPods Max stay at six, still the smoothest choice inside the Apple ecosystem despite the older battery. Further down, Soundcore keeps the value crown, the Space 2 and Q45 deliver most of the flagship experience for a fraction of the price. My guidance has not changed, buy the Sony for the best overall package, the Bose for all-day comfort, and Soundcore if you want flagship features on a budget.

highlights.title: Sony XM6 leads on the numbers
highlights.body: Six-month testing keeps the XM6 top for measured noise cancellation and a 10-band EQ that shapes sound with real precision.

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra owns comfort
highlights.body: The 2nd Gen stays the most comfortable over-ear for long sessions, with plush cushions that also add passive isolation.

highlights.title: Sennheiser doubles up
highlights.body: Momentum 5 and Momentum 4 hold third and fourth on rich detail and long battery, a rare one-two in the top five.

highlights.title: Soundcore keeps value honest
highlights.body: Space 2 and Q45 deliver most of the flagship experience at a fraction of the price for budget-focused buyers.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週第一名還是 Sony WH-1000XM6，七月陸續出爐的長期評測也站在我這邊。Tom's Guide 用了六個月，還是把 XM6 評為最全能的一副，實測降噪是同級最強，10 段 EQ 讓你調音的自由度遠超對手。日常使用電量也比 Bose 撐得久，這點你真的戴上一陣子就會懂，比規格表上的數字更有感。第二名 Bose QuietComfort Ultra，靠的是舒適度。評測一致認為第二代是長時間配戴最舒服的罩耳款，耳墊更厚，順帶把被動隔音也拉高。如果你一天要連續搭機或坐辦公桌八小時，這個舒適優勢是真的有差。Sennheiser 這次前五名佔了兩席，第三、第四是 Momentum 5 跟 Momentum 4，兩支都以細節豐富的聲底跟超長續航著稱。第五名 Sennheiser HDB 630 走比較發燒的路線，音色平衡很出色。Apple AirPods Max 維持第六，在蘋果生態圈裡還是體驗最順的一副，雖然電量規格舊了點。再往下 Soundcore 穩坐性價比王座，Space 2 跟 Q45 用零頭的價格給你接近旗艦的體驗。我的建議沒變，要最全面買 Sony，要整天舒適挑 Bose，想用小錢拿旗艦功能就看 Soundcore。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 數據最強
highlights.body: 六個月實測仍讓 XM6 穩居降噪第一，10 段 EQ 調音精準度是它的關鍵優勢。

highlights.title: Bose QC Ultra 最舒服
highlights.body: 第二代是長時間配戴最舒適的罩耳款，厚耳墊順帶把被動隔音也拉高。

highlights.title: Sennheiser 一次上兩支
highlights.body: Momentum 5 跟 4 佔據第三、第四，靠細節豐富的聲底跟超長續航，前五名難得的雙保險。

highlights.title: Soundcore 守住性價比
highlights.body: Space 2 跟 Q45 用零頭價格給你接近旗艦的體驗，預算取向的首選。

references.title: The 5 Best Noise Cancelling Headphones of 2026
I tested the Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 for 6 months — and there's a clear winner
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs. Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2 Headphones: Review

en.commentary:
The Sony WH-1000XM6 stays my number one this week, and the fresh head-to-head reviews only reinforce it. Sony pairs class-leading noise cancellation with a 10-band EQ that lets me dial the sound exactly how I like, 30 hours of battery, and a folding design that finally returned to the line. For travel, the office, or a noisy cafe, it does everything well and asks for very few compromises. This is the pair I recommend to most people.

The Bose QuietComfort Ultra holds second, and it earns it. Its passive isolation and plush earcups make it the most comfortable option for marathon listening sessions, and its ANC trades blows with Sony at the extremes of the frequency range. If comfort tops your list, this is the smarter buy.

The Sennheiser Momentum 5 stays third for listeners who chase the richest, most detailed sound, backed by battery life that outlasts almost everything I test. Further down, the Soundcore Space 2 continues to shock me with how much ANC and battery it delivers for the money, which keeps its value score high.

My guidance is unchanged. Buy the Sony XM6 for the best all-round package. Pick the Bose QC Ultra if comfort rules your day, reach for the Momentum 5 for pure sound quality, or grab the Soundcore Space 2 to get most of the experience for a fraction of the price.

highlights.title: Sony XM6 is the all-rounder
highlights.body: Class-leading ANC, a 10-band EQ, 30-hour battery, and a returning folding design make it the pair I recommend for travel, office, and everything between.

highlights.title: Bose wins on comfort
highlights.body: Plush earcups and strong passive isolation make the QuietComfort Ultra the most comfortable choice for long sessions, with ANC that matches Sony at the extremes.

highlights.title: For pure sound quality
highlights.body: The Sennheiser Momentum 5 serves the richest, most detailed presentation here, paired with battery life that outlasts nearly everything I test.

highlights.title: Best value
highlights.body: The Soundcore Space 2 delivers most of the flagship ANC and long battery for a fraction of the price, which keeps its value score near the top.

zh-tw.commentary:
Sony WH-1000XM6 這週還是我的第一名，新出的對決評測只是更確認這件事。Sony 把頂級降噪配上 10 段 EQ，讓我可以把聲音調成我最愛的樣子，30 小時電力，還把可折疊設計終於帶回產品線。搭飛機、在辦公室、坐吵鬧的咖啡廳，它樣樣做得好，幾乎不用妥協。這是我推給多數人的那一副。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra 排第二，實至名歸。它的被動隔音跟柔軟耳罩，是長時間馬拉松式聆聽最舒服的選擇，降噪在頻率兩端也跟 Sony 你來我往。如果舒適是你的第一順位，這副更聰明。

Sennheiser Momentum 5 排第三，適合追求最厚實、最有細節聲音的人，續航也幾乎打趴我測過的所有機種。再往下看，Soundcore Space 2 一直讓我很驚訝，這個價位給到這麼多降噪跟續航，難怪 value 分數居高不下。

建議沒變。要最全面的整體包就買 Sony XM6。舒適至上選 Bose QC Ultra，純聽感選 Momentum 5，想用零頭價格拿到大部分體驗就抓 Soundcore Space 2。

highlights.title: Sony XM6 最全能
highlights.body: 頂級降噪、10 段 EQ、30 小時電力，加上重新回歸的可折疊設計，搭飛機、辦公室到通勤都推它。

highlights.title: Bose 舒適度勝出
highlights.body: 柔軟耳罩加上扎實被動隔音，QuietComfort Ultra 是長時間聆聽最舒服的選擇，降噪在頻率兩端也追平 Sony。

highlights.title: 純聽感首選
highlights.body: Sennheiser Momentum 5 給出這裡最厚實、最有細節的聲音，續航還幾乎打趴我測過的每一副。

highlights.title: 最超值
highlights.body: Soundcore Space 2 用零頭的價格給到大部分旗艦降噪跟長續航，value 分數一直排在前面。
